programme.title: Moonshiners: The Marvelous Mrs. Tickle

programme.desc: Tickle rallies fellow shiners to make the most of quarantine. Digger and Tim devise recipes for high-proof hand sanitizer, Josh takes social distancing to an off-grid extreme and newlywed Tickle finds lockdown is a lot better than being locked up.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The First Run: Moonshining 101

programme.title: Moonshiners: Legend of 'Popcorn' Sutton

programme.desc: Tickle hosts as Appalachia's most notorious moonshiners go head-to-head in a moonshine distilling competition. Mark, Digger and Tim run their own secret recipes to be judged by the public to determine once and for all who makes the best shine.

programme.desc: George and Angie invite trouble into their home when they take Marisol in out of sympathy.

programme.title: Full House: Breaking Away
programme.desc: Rebecca and Jesse are apprehensive about having their boys attend a local preschool.

programme.title: Full House: Making Out Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: Jesse's band replaces him with a new lead singer; Stephanie attends a coed party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods. Later SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Roller Cowards/ Bucket Sweet Bucket
programme.desc: When the scariest roller coaster ever opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park, SpongeBob and Patrick are determined to ride it. But the more they think about it, the less they want to do it. Later, Plankton tricks SpongeBob into fixing the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to save him. After failing to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Race to the Top/ Meet Harl Hubbs
programme.desc: Fendrich and Sinclair compete to win the City's tallest building contest. An off-screen narrator, narrates a day in the life of helpful handyman, Harl Hubbs.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Save Our Shores
programme.desc: A huge trash spill at the beach endangers the local wildlife; Scrozzle sets about finding reinforcements.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gullible Pants/ Overbooked
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab for 15 minutes. SpongeBob triple-books his schedule, and does his best to be at all three events at the same time.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob quits his job for the jellyfish; Bob is convinced that it's Opposite Day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidward's School for Grown Ups/ Oral Report
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Hat for Pat/ Toy Store of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job as a sign-holder. SpongeBob and Patrick spend the night locked in a toy store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Life Insurance/ Burst Your Bubble
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger. When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one. Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: The Loud House: Write and Wrong/ Purrfect Gig
programme.desc: Mom tries to convince a newspaper editor that her kids are perfect in order to land a parenting advice column job. When the McBrides go out of town, they hire Luna to catsit but the job becomes more demanding than she imagined.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lock 'N Loud/ The Whole Picture
programme.desc: Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door; Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos.

programme.title: Hoarders: Andrew/ Lydia
programme.desc: Stuck in a hoarded house, with no job, no motivation and no direction, Andrew needs to control his hoarding to have a normal life. Lydia's son may be sent to a nursing home if she doesn't clean her house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dick and Karen
programme.desc: Dick has hoarded out his girlfriend Sandy's house to the point that the two of them can no longer live in it. Karen started hoarding after the tragic suicide of her oldest son.

programme.title: Hoarders: Stacey/ Roi
programme.desc: Stacey has two days to get rid of the 47 dogs and cats that have taken over her house, or she may lose both her daughter and her home. Roi has been evicted from his home, as there are too many dangerous hazards there.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joanne/ Kristy
programme.desc: The trauma of dealing with Joanne's hoarding was so bad for her daughter that she developed post-traumatic stress disorder. After experiencing the horror of assault, Kristi began shopping to escape her pain.

programme.title: Hoarders: Barbara/ Richard
programme.desc: Barbara has been a hoarder her entire life, but it spiralled out of control after the deaths of her two sons. Richard became a hoarder after his life went downhill.

programme.title: Hoarders: Roxann and Barbara
programme.desc: Roxann is a vibrant, beautiful 32-year old mother and former model who has successfully hidden her hoarding until now. She fears Child Protective Services will intervene if she doesn't clean up her hoarded home.

programme.title: The First 48: Hot Lot/ Blind Faith
programme.desc: In Birmingham, detectives try to solve the mystery of how a young man was shot in the back in the middle of a scrap yard with no witnesses.

programme.title: The First 48: Ultimate Price
programme.desc: In Miami, a Good Samaritan is shot dead while intervening in a robbery.

programme.title: The First 48: Down in Overtown/ Breaking Point
programme.desc: In Miami, a young father is gunned down after a night of gambling.

programme.title: The First 48: House of Pain/ Into the Night
programme.desc: A friendly house party turns into a double murder. Also, a hardworking father stops for a drink after work and is the victim of a robbery gone bad.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: After her moose video goes viral, Mary focuses full time on making Tirdy Works a viable business. Her partner Deb gives her an ultimatum: make the business profitable by the end of winter or quit.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cyber Buddies
programme.desc: Find out which bit involving a scandalous photograph didn't make the cut, and which Joker got fired twice in one summer. Plus, learn which challenge took all day and night to complete.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Find out why Murr is particular about the way labels face in grocery stores, how Sal always gets Joe to break character and who works out with a personal trainer.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The C-Team
programme.desc: Station 24 is forced to work with the buff and handsome C-Team and their new transfer Delilah. Terry buys a gas-guzzling truck and Eddie takes him for a ride.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: The C-Team

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Up All Night
programme.desc: The hilarious Sydney Castillo wants that old thing back, aka his hair. Plus, funny woman Rachel Feinstein has her hands full on a playdate, and the hysterical Mark Viera feels the spirit of the wildcat in his new kicks.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pumpkin Spice Bride
programme.desc: Comedian Corey Rodrigues' mind is playing tricks on him, Calvin Evans gives up his seat on the bus (then asks for it back), and the hilarious Yamaneika is a maid with no honor at her friend's pumpkin spice-themed wedding.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pizza Panties
programme.desc: Vanessa Gonzalez gets hot and heavy over pizza, Rita Brent meets a six-year-old with more than just an old soul, and Gina Yashere comes face to face with a Jamaican pick-up artist. Plus, Orlando Leyba exposes a big scam at the gym.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 5

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 6
programme.desc: 20 real-life video clips of dopes driving dangerously for your amusement, including a thief in a hijacked backhoe, a trucker using Flintstone-style technology, and an Amish buggy driver who couldn't care less about the rules of the road.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: Las Vegas: When You Got to Go, You Got to Go
programme.desc: Danny and Mike frantically search the city for Ed when he is kidnapped.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Sperm Whales and Spearmint Rhinos
programme.desc: Mike is reunited with his ex-girlfriend from college who has a strange request for him.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Lie is Cast
programme.desc: Danny's generous act gets him into trouble with the police and Ed cleans up the mess.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from a beautiful former co-worker visits Ed whose mere presence puts everyone's lives in serious danger. Danny and Mike have to protect this woman with the mysterious background. Delinda and Nessa compete for a high roller's affection.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Can You See What I See?
programme.desc: Ed decides to shake things up at the casino by switching everyone's job positions around.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Can You See What I See?

programme.title: Las Vegas: Tainted Love

programme.title: Las Vegas: To Protect and Serve Manicotti
programme.desc: Danny and Mike feverishly work to reclaim $100,000 stolen from the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: One Nation, Under Surveillance
programme.desc: An ex-Marine turned local politician is embroiled in a sordid scandal with a 16-year-old.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Hit Me
programme.desc: When surveillance technology fails to catch a thief, Ed must rely on human ingenuity.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Hide and Sneak
programme.desc: A high-rolling vampire mysteriously shows up in Sam's room and tries to seduce her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Letters, Lawyer, and Loose Women
programme.desc: Mike agrees to help a hotel guest who has lost his wedding ring at a local brothel.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Magic Carpet Fred
programme.desc: A beguiling magician uses his skills to help Ed catch a slippery thief.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Centennial
programme.desc: The new owner of the Montecito will be making some changes to the personnel and property.

programme.title: Movie: Easy A
programme.desc: A high school student uses a rumour about losing her virginity to raise her social standing and make money.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pound Cake to Pot Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' in for a mishmash of comfort food. In Philadelphia, the low country joint dishing out unique North African chicken and sour cream pound cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fusion of Flavors
programme.desc: In Chicago, a saucy spot mashes up Latin and Asian, putting a unique spin on paella and posole. A comfort food joint in Seattle fires things up with Nashville hot chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Great Gear
programme.desc: Guy's grabbing grub cooked up with some great gear. In San Francisco, a place firin' up lights-out lamb and huge pork biscuits in some of the city's last remaining indoor smokers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old School Joints
programme.desc: Guy gets a taste of yesteryear. In Duluth, an Italian market/restaurant is stacking up hearty homemade lasagna and a monster muffaletta. In Eugene, Ore., DDD's first all-vegan spot serves their signature tofu sammy and frozen peanut butter.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly, Beef and Bratwurst
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hittin' the road and diggin' into some serious meat. In Atlanta, a funky Asian spot putting out prime-time pork belly and wok-fried chicken. In Vancouver, an elevated diner dishing out duck pancakes and not-your-momma's meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D All Stars
programme.desc: In Georgetown, Texas, Guy hooks up with Matthew McConaughey at a massive diner serving up righteous ham and waffles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: What's for Breakfast?
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out breakfast places such as a juice bar making bagels from scratch, and a roadhouse mixing Philly food with Southwestern favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faves, New Craves
programme.desc: In Annapolis, Maryland, two Irish brothers serving up food from their homeland with a twist, like Guinness fried oysters with homemade coleslaw.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kid Rock's Detroit Tour
programme.desc: Guy's taking Kid Rock's lead on a tour through D-town!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Guy's All-Star Guests
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a rock-star lineup kickin' it with him in the kitchen. First, in Kansas City, Mo., Chiefs' head coach Andy Reid tackles pigskin at a joint meticulous about their meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting some families keeping it real in the kitchen in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey, Taters And Dogs
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a righteous mashup of flavors. In Orlando, Fla. Joey Fatone is riding shotgun to a potato-centric palace, plus a trip to his very own hot dog hangout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's driving the Camaro all over the nation for some real deal eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Only Get It Here
programme.desc: Guy is on the hunt for funky flavours, starting in San Francisco at an Asian/American/Mexican fusion joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Signature Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy is visiting places across the country and trying out their sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Made to Order
programme.desc: Guy discovers an Italian joint doing lobster ravioli with homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Traditional Gone Wild
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into some dishes like mama made, if she had a wild imagination.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Farm to Table
programme.desc: Guy explores restaurants that serve literally from the farm and the ocean to the table.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wings, Dogs and Claws
programme.desc: Guy checks out the best homemade cooking in the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: And the Kicker Is
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a restaurant in Columbia with homemade patties, a corner store in Buffalo serving everything with a side of homemade bread and a diner that's redefining scrapple in Berkeley.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cooking For Jeffrey: Big Breakfast Buffet
programme.desc: Ina Garten entertains her friends, Devon Fredericks and Eli Zabar. They're serious foodies, so the pressure's on as she creates a stunning easy buffet with a Potato Pancetta Frittata, Overnight Belgian Waffles.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Ladies Who Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay has the perfect brunch for all the lovely ladies in his life and yours. The light and flavorful menu includes cheesy Mushroom and Grits Quiche topped with a vibrant Kale Pesto, and Easy Almond Sticky Buns.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Jade And Giada Day
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis treats Jade to a special day of mother-daughter fun and a delicious dinner.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Celebrating Mothers, Daughters and Daughters-in-Law
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and her friend, Suzanne, have always shared the bond of being mothers of sons, but now they have an opportunity to join the mother-daughter club. Valerie prepares a meal for Suzanne and her daughter-in-law.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Almost Healthy
programme.desc: Ree is making almost healthy and totally fabulous versions of classics. There's everyone's favourite cheeseburger sliders with portobellos instead of buns, fantastic cauliflower fried rice, zucchini lasagna and almost-instant fast and fruity ice cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Meg's Getting Married
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing recipes and stories from an engagement fiesta she hosted for a family friend. She re-creates the Tex-Mex party menu by making out-of-this-world crispy cerveza battered fish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Mom Deliveries
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is honoring some of her favorite moms by making sweet deliveries. She starts with strawberry cheesecake brownies for her stepmom and a blood orange rosemary pound cake to pack up and mail to her mom, Gerre.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 4
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's four kids are pitching in to help their mom shoot a special homemade episode with easy quarantine recipes for Mother's Day. Easy steak frites, and for pasta fans and busy mothers everywhere, she makes stovetop chicken spaghetti.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Oh, Fry Goodness!
programme.desc: Molly is sharing her most epic fried masterpieces, nothing tastes better than crispy, crunchy deliciousness. Oh fry goodness!

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: If Mama Ain't Happy ...
programme.desc: Valerie knows that taking care of herself makes her a better mom, so this Mother's Day, she's inviting over Angela Kinsey to relax and practice some self-care, which of course involves a decadent meal.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Light Low Country
programme.desc: Kardea is having two special guests over for dinner -- her mom and grandma! Since her grandma is watching what she eats, Kardea prepares a meal that's deliciously Southern without breaking the calorie counter.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Sunday Supper
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has invited some of his best chef friends to the ranch to share their favorite homestyle recipes for an old-fashioned Sunday supper. Alex Guarnaschelli starts the meal off right with a pitcher of lemony negronis.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: Family-Inspired Feast
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are at home and sharing family-inspired recipes, then giving a shout-out to super-fan moms for Mother's Day. Jeff makes sausage and mini sweet peppers to deliver it to this mother and mother-in-law. Alex makes an asparagus quiche.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Drop the Knife
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Colin Quinn and the dashing Katie Lee bring two New York chefs to challenge Bobby. Alex Guarnaschelli's protégé Diane Vista-Wayne and Daniel Boulud's protégé Lauren Brown compete.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: They Had Style, They Had Food, They Were There!
programme.desc: Actress Fran Drescher joins Chopped's Scott Conant to beat Bobby Flay with style, food and flair. They're upping the ante by bringing in two fantastic pastry chefs, Jessica Scott and Shelby Sieg, who are ready to bake Bobby into a corner.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Chef Adrianne Calvo is bringing her Miami heat as she goes head-to-head with German native and top Pennsylvania chef Ben Thomas.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Power of Jane
programme.desc: Actress Jane Krakowski teams up with Chef Michael Symon to steal Bobby Flay's spotlight. They bring in no-nonsense chefs Attila Bollok from Los Angeles and Matthew Spinner from Cleveland to give Bobby an early curtain call.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Challah At Your Boy!
programme.desc: Anne Burrell and Jay Pharoah plot and strategize on how to get Bobby Flay beat. Canadian chef Rene Rodriguez brings his south of the border flavors against the Italian fare of chef Michael Kramer.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rules are Meant to be Broken
programme.desc: 'Chopped' host Ted Allen and comedian Margaret Cho don't play by the rules when it comes to taking down Bobby Flay. To do their dirty work, they've brought in renegade chefs Diane DiMeo and Ian Russo to put culinary golden boy Bobby in his place.

programme.desc: The Parent Teacher Association of Elmore Junior High ban video games, so the kids try and prove that games aren’t a bad influence.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Wish
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin believe they’ve turned Miss Simian into a neck-cushion.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Anybody
programme.desc: Clayton uses his ability to shapeshift in order to earn money by taking their detentions for them. GB and DW need to track him down before he ups his criminal game.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Revolt
programme.desc: Darwin feels bad for the household objects in Elmore and encourages them to rise up.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Shippening
programme.desc: Sarah finds a notebook from an awesome store which magically makes what she draws happen. Unfortunately, she draws bizarre love stories throughout Elmore.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Mess
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin baby-sit, then baby-lose, Penny’s little sister.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Island Adventures
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Animals: It's Just a Word
programme.desc: After the other Titans are injured, Beast Boy donates his blood to save them.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Snuggle Time
programme.desc: When yet another crime alert interrupts their relaxation, the Titans decide to become villains and do whatever they want.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Cat's Fancy
programme.desc: Robin decides to become a cat so that Starfire will finally love him.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: What’s Opera, Titans?
programme.desc: Robin surprises the Titans with a trip to the opera but they soon fall asleep, and all dream about starring in their own operas.

programme.desc: Lion-O and the ThunderCats crash land on Third Earth and try to make it home.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Last Date
programme.desc: Roseanne insists Dan go out with her for one last Saturday night 'date' before their baby arrives and crash a Bar Mitzvah. Becky and Darlene bond over a bottle of Peppermint Schnapps.

programme.title: Roseanne: Halloween: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: The Ouija board makes this Halloween the weirdest and the happiest one of all. During a seance, Roseanne goes into labor and must be rushed to the hospital, where she gives birth to Jerry Garcia Conner.

programme.title: Roseanne: Scenes From a Barbecue
programme.desc: Roseanne's loveable Grandma Mary pays a visit for Mother's Day.

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Make Me Over
programme.desc: A glamorous Roseanne emerges from her Mother's Day makeover at the Beauty Box, only to discover Becky and Darlene have an ulterior motive behind their very thoughtful gift.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Special Tug
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan drop Jake off at a friend's house and head out for some sibling bonding at the movies, but their night is ruined when Alan freaks out after convincing himself that Jake was too eager to spend the weekend away from him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Humiliation Is a Visual Medium
programme.desc: No one believes Charlie when he says that his relationship with Mia is getting serious, and everyone really thinks he's lost it when he confesses that they have been dating for more than a month and haven't consummated the relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Love Isn't Blind, It's Retarded
programme.desc: Charlie plans a romantic date with Mia in the hopes of finally consummating their relationship. Meanwhile, Alan starts dating Kandi, Charlie's most recent ex-girlfriend, who is half his age.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Tongue Is Meat
programme.desc: Charlie can't keep pace with the healthy lifestyle that Mia has introduced to their relationship, so he sneaks cigars and beers in the garage. When Mia busts him for lying, Charlie has to figure out if he's just whipped or truly in love.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Unfortunate Little Schnauser
programme.desc: Charlie boycotts an advertising awards banquet, having lost several years in a row to his cocky arch nemesis Archie. After devising a ploy to get him to attend, Alan, Evelyn and Jake accompany Charlie for support, until they get to know Archie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Spit-Covered Cobbler
programme.desc: When Kandi's old car breaks down, Alan ends up leasing her a new one. Charlie warns him to break things off with her, but when Alan spends his last dime on Kandi's root canal and can't pay Judith's alimony, Charlie is forced to cover for him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin
programme.desc: Charlie's not happy when he learns that Kandi has been living in sin with Alan in his house, particularly because of his own recent dry spell with women. Things begin to look up for Charlie when a special visitor comes knocking on his door.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro
programme.desc: Alan is depressed that his hot, young girlfriend, Kandi, has left him to go stay with his bitter ex-wife, Judith, who has brainwashed her against him. Meanwhile, Kandi sets Judith up on a date with her father, Andy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: And the Plot Moistens
programme.desc: Jake's teacher, Francine, calls Alan and Judith in to discuss Jake's lack of interest in school. Desperate to communicate with someone intelligent while continuing to see his airhead girlfriend, Kandi, Alan starts a platonic relationship with Francine.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Once With Aunt Sophie
programme.desc: When a cute girl from Jake's school invites him to a party, Charlie butts in on Alan's milestone moment with his son by offering his own words of wisdom on women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Arguments for the Quickie
programme.desc: When Charlie finds out that Mia is in town with her dance troupe, he opts not to see her and tries to convince Alan that he's over her. Charlie gets another surprise when Mia explains that she wants something personal from him, his sperm.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Pistol-Packin' Hermaphrodite
programme.desc: Wedding bells loom as Charlie and Mia make their wedding plans, but when their families meet, things immediately begin to fall apart. Ultimately, Charlie and his bride-to-be end up deciding on a small ceremony in Vegas.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Working for Caligula
programme.desc: Now that newlywed Alan has moved out, Charlie returns to his bachelor lifestyle.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Who Is This Vod Kanockers?
programme.desc: Alan feels guilty when he learns that Charlie and Mia didn't tie the knot because she had wanted him and Jake to move out. Meanwhile, Charlie and his rock star neighbour don't get along.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Sea Is a Harsh Mistress
programme.desc: Charlie tries surfing in order to impress a beautiful girl, with disastrous results. He later tells Alan that when his life was hanging in the balance, their deceased father came to him and made a request that Charlie is reluctant to fulfill.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Reckless Abandonment
programme.desc: When Barb and Matthew both announce they're moving out and Ritchie leaves for science camp, Christine tries to prove to everyone, including herself, that she's capable of taking care of herself.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Honey, I Ran Over the Kid
programme.desc: Christine accuses Richard of bad parenting when Ritchie gets hurt at a skateboarding party. She soon surpasses him as the worse parent when her over-protectiveness backfires.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Too Close for Christine
programme.desc: Christine is initially flattered when another scatterbrained mother at Ritchie's school considers her a 'rock,' but quickly tires of the responsibility of being responsible.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Change of Heart/ Pants
programme.desc: Christine and Richard help Marly and Lindsay through labour, evoking memories of Ritchie's birth and renewing romantic feelings.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Hair
programme.desc: After one too many cheap shots on her by the mean moms at Ritchie's snotty private school, Christine decides to enrol him in public school, which is not as easy as she anticipated.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: He Ain't Heavy
programme.desc: In her attempt to help Matthew lose weight using her know-how as the owner of a gym, Christine finds herself unable to shed the extra pounds she's put on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon
programme.desc: Dorothy is contacted by a high school teacher she once had a crush on. They quickly begin seeing each other and Dorothy is convinced his feelings are genuine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers
programme.desc: Dorothy desperately schemes to become a contestant on the game show Jeopardy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan
programme.desc: As associate producer of Wake Up Miami, Rose needs a hot news story for sweeps week.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy gives a speech at Career Day and is offered a job as a motivational trainer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose
programme.desc: Rose is upset when she misses her high school's 40-year reunion due to poor health.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose
programme.desc: Only Kirsten is allowed to see Rose before surgery, everyone else waits anxiously.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Dorothy accepts Lucas's marriage proposal and they wed. Blanche, Rose, and Dorothy say a tearful goodbye with Dorothy planning on moving to Atlanta. Meanwhile, Sophia makes a final decision on where she wants to live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Engagement
programme.desc: Blanche announces that Harry has proposed leaving Rose worried about where she will live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?
programme.desc: Dorothy invites her ex-husband Stan to their daughter's wedding so she can get revenge.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose the Prude
programme.desc: Rose has qualms about sharing her stateroom on an upcoming cruise with a man she likes.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Transplant
programme.desc: Blanche has to make a life-altering decision when the sister she hates needs a kidney.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social
programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible
programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: Working at the Cow Wash
programme.desc: As summer arrives, the team hosts a carwash fundraiser to help the cows and donkeys receive medication. Dan goes on a covert mission to save KJ an injured goat kid, and a donkey called Mary Pete needs medical attention.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: House Fire Rescue
programme.desc: Chris experiences his first rescue and saves two goats called Hugo and Emmy who are in need of serious medical attention. Joey the calf returns after a series of surgeries, and Lola the kid goat is surprised with a prosthetic.

programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible
programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: Most of the wildlife in Maine consists of moose, bear and deer. However, on occasion exotic animals make their way into the state and the wardens need to be prepared for anything. This time Sergeant Spahr wrangles a Boa Constrictor.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Passing the Torch
programme.desc: Warden Blanchard shows a high school student there is no such thing as a boring day on the job. Warden LaFlamme is promoted to Corporal of Landowner Relations and passes the responsibilities of his district on to Warden Lounder.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hot on the Heels
programme.desc: The game wardens are on the lookout for over eager sportsmen trying to bend the rules as the season comes to close. One warden catches a Canadian posing as an American while others bring a fugitive to justice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fighting the Flood
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas intervenes when a black bear cub gets separated from its mother and wreaks havoc on a small community. As heavy rains cause rivers to flood, Officer Eric Fluette races to rescue a man whose canoe has flipped in the rapids.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Way Out
programme.desc: When an out of state hunter appears to be lying about the circumstances surrounding his deer kill, Officers Bob Mancini and Kevin Bronson investigate. Conservation Officers work with volunteers to recover the body of a missing hiker on Mt. Washington.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Officer Eric Hannett and Officer Bill Boudreau chase down a likely deer poacher. Officer Glen Lucas makes a dangerous trek to the summit of Mt. Washington to rescue a stranded and injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: McKee and Pushee confront two hunters lying about illegally baiting deer, Officer Arsenault deals with a tight-lipped teenage fisherman who refuses to provide any information and Lt. Boudreau stumbles upon a couple in a compromising position.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Collision Course
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett track a hunter at an illegal bait site. Officers Towne, Matson and Jones investigate a teenage hunter with a changing story. And a routine patrol in icy conditions becomes a life-changing event for Officer Lucas.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Trouble
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau, K9 Ruby and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunter suspected of shooting a turkey from the road. Officer McKee searches for a baby owl that fell from its nest. And Officer Hannett rushes to lead a carryout when a hiker is injured.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Squirrel Shakedown
programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.title: Movie: Little Man
programme.desc: A family mistakenly adopts a vertically challenged criminal on the run from the police, not realizing he is a man and not a child.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Movie: National Security
programme.desc: An officer finds himself out of a job after he is involved in an altercation, and winds up becoming a security guard who uncovers a smuggling operation.

programme.desc: Nikki grounds her daughter just before a concert and tries to fill in for her.

programme.desc: Nikki decides to pay tribute to her great uncle for an African-American culture festival.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Crowd Control

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Making the Cut
programme.desc: Kim is done having babies and they have to figure out a permanent birth control plan. She and Kroy decide that he should have a vasectomy. Lana gets the runaround when she's left alone in the house to take care of Kroy and Kim.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Destination Destin

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Spring Break Forever, Biermanns

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Flipping Out

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: I Need a Man

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Outward Bound

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Campfire Confessions

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Future Shock
programme.desc: Kim and Kroy fly to Miami for a consultation as she considers post-baby plastic surgery. Back at home, boy-crazy Ariana craves her independence.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Kimmie's Back

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Off the Bench

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Goes Gaga
programme.desc: Lisa tries to reverse her status as one of the least popular girls in school by ghostwriting positive things about herself on the school blog.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Them and Us
programme.desc: Steve Backshall explores the relationship we have with insects and arthropods. Steve reveals how we couldn't live without them.

programme.title: Movie: Rear Window
programme.desc: A photographer who spies on his courtyard neighbours discovers a possible murder.

programme.title: Movie: Vertigo
programme.desc: A web of obsession and deceit unfolds when Scottie Ferguson, a retired detective, falls in love with Madeleine, the wife of an old college friend. She has hired him to follow her, resulting in a tragic death because of his crippling fear of heights.

programme.title: Movie: The Birds
programme.desc: In a California coastal town, flocks of birds attack humans for no reason.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho
programme.desc: Wishing to improve her situation in life, Marion Crane decides to steal $40,000 from her boss. On route to meeting her lover, Marion gets caught in a storm and decides to spend the night at a desolate motel, which leads to a tragic outcome.

programme.title: US Secret Service: On the Front Line: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with the Secret Service as they protect the President of the U.S.

programme.title: North Korea From the Inside With Michael Palin
programme.desc: Michael and the crew captured the historic meeting between Kim John-Un and Moon Jae-In. Michael visited sites and locations rarely, if ever, explored in his journey across the country, spending time with citizens from all walks of life.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: Declassified:: Then and Now with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Lisa Ling goes undercover in North Korea for a rare glimpse of the secretive country.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: Declassified:: The Kim Dynasty
programme.desc: The Kim family’s hold on power is believed by the North Korean’s to be the only thing saving them from annihilation.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: Declassified:: The Cyber State
programme.desc: North Korea embraces cyber-crime for profit and disruption with a 6000 strong army of cyber criminals worldwide.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: Declassified:: Then and Now with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Lisa Ling goes undercover in North Korea for a rare glimpse of the secretive country.

programme.title: Facing: Escobar
programme.desc: Follow the tale of the drug lord Escobar's cocaine empire, built on bribes, bodies, and trust.

programme.title: Facing: Suge Knight
programme.desc: Suge Knight, trace the billion-dollar rise and fall, rap mogul and accused murderer.

programme.title: Facing Schwarzenegger
programme.desc: Facing Schwarzenegger explores one of the greatest immigrant success stories of our time.

programme.title: Facing: Saddam
programme.desc: Learn how Saddam Hussein used terror and violence to control Iraq for a quarter century.

programme.title: Facing: Putin
programme.desc: This is the story of Russian leader Vladimir Putin, told by those who know him best.

programme.title: Elephant Queen
programme.desc: Its March - late summer in the Kalahari desert. Decision time for the old matriarchs of the herd. This summer, the rains just havent materialized, and the nutritious desert is drying early.

programme.title: Leopard Queen
programme.desc: Tracking the life of Manana, a wild leopard who allowed herself to be filmed for 17 years.

programme.title: Mother Croc
programme.desc: High-speed cameras capture the crocodile's stunning combination of stealth, power and speed, as well as its remarkable maternal instincts.

programme.title: Queen of the Chase
programme.desc: Discovering the secret lives of cheetahs in the open plains of the Serengeti in Tanzania.

programme.title: Birth of a Pride
programme.desc: Lions were near extinction in Selinda, but now their number has gone from two to over 60.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Bad News Bear
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley risks her life to save a brown bear from drowning.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: When Horses Fly
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley gets into a high altitude chase with some of the Yukons toughest wild horses.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: One Mad Mama
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley chases sheep and reunites with a dog with a puzzling paw problem.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Poking the Bear
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley performs examinations on two black bears during a dangerous relocation.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Oh, The Hu-Manatee!
programme.desc: The staff welcomes rescued manatees to the newly renovated ZooTampa Manatee hospital.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret Alien Signals
programme.desc: Bizarre markings are observed from space in oceans and deserts across the planet. Strange sightings point to conspiracies that could have global repercussions.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit
programme.desc: A strange circular forest is found next to a notorious cannibal site. Then, when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters of Diamond Desert
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past. When a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: How It's Made: Solid Tires, Cheesecake, Canoe Paddles, Globes
programme.desc: Find out how solid tires, cheesecake, canoe paddles and globes are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Cookware, Biodiesel, Clothes Hangers, Insulation
programme.desc: Learn how they make cast iron cookware, clothes hangers and stone wool insulation.

programme.title: How It's Made: Revolver Replicas/ Arc Trainers/ Oil Furnaces/ Vegetable Peeler
programme.desc: Find out how western revolver replicas, arc trainers and vegetable peelers are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Umbrellas, Outboard Motors, Silver Cutlery, Tape Measures
programme.desc: Features umbrellas; outboard motors; silver cutlery; tape measures.

programme.title: How It's Made: Moldings, Pulleys, Industrial Rubber Hoses, Sheet Vinyl
programme.desc: Find out the details in the construction of architectural moldings, pulleys, industrial rubber hoses, and sheet vinyl.

programme.title: How It's Made: Bicycle Helmets, Lithium Batteries, Car Brakes, Aluminum
programme.desc: Bicycle helmets, lithium batteries, car brakes, and aluminum are depended on every day. Find out how each is made.

programme.desc: Find out how glass bottles, hacksaws and goalie masks are fabricated.

programme.desc: Find out how manhole covers, range hoods, artificial logs, and snowmobiles are made.

programme.desc: Learn how bowling bowls, barber poles and radar guns are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Wood Watches, Steel Bicycles, Raw Pet Food, and Replica Police Lanterns
programme.desc: Featuring wood watches; steel bicycles; raw pet food; replica police lanterns.

programme.title: How It's Made: Motorcycles, Clay Pipes, Drum Sticks and Whistles
programme.desc: Learn how familiar objects of everyday life are made, including motorcycles, clay pipes, drumsticks, whistles.

programme.title: How It's Made: Table Tennis Tables, Plastic Model Kits, and Light Microscopes
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Led Stage Lights, Apple Cider, Chemical Tank Trailers, And Stone Floors
programme.desc: The team studies how LED stage lights, chemical tank trailers, apple cider and ornate stone floors come to be.

programme.title: How It's Made: Tapioca Pudding, Snow Ploughs, Paddle Boats, Fibre Cement Siding
programme.desc: Learn the secrets behind tapioca pudding, snow ploughs, paddle boats, and fibre cement siding.

programme.title: How It's Made: CO2 Cartridges, Pretzels, Scissor Lifts, Skating Rinks
programme.desc: Uncover the secrets behind the construction of CO2 cartridges, pretzels, scissor lifts and skating rinks.

programme.title: How It's Made: Air Boats, Onions, 3-D Metal Printing, Curved Cabinet Doors
programme.desc: Features air boats, onions, 3D metal printing and curved cabinet doors.

programme.title: How It's Made: Upright Pianos, Flags, Wet/ Dry Vacs, Medieval Axes
programme.desc: See how upright pianos, flags, wet/ dry vacs and medieval axes are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Horse Bits; Oat Cereal; Turquoise Jewelry; Electric Scooters
programme.desc: On this episode of How It's Made, find out how Horse Bits, Oat Cereal, Turquoise Jewelry, and Electric Scooters are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Leather Overnight Bags; Horse Exercisers; Air Hockey Tables; Copper Sculptures
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Office Chairs, Vinobrew, Reconditioned Sander Drums, Lithographs
programme.desc: Featuring office chairs; vinobrew; reconditioned sander drums; lithographs.

programme.title: How It's Made: Sleeper Rigs, Pecans, Steel Pulleys, Acetate Eyewear
programme.desc: Find out how sleeper rigs, pecans, steel pulleys, and acetate eyewear are made.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Learn the manufacturing process being pipes, rock climbing gear and leather bike saddles.

programme.title: How It's Made: Graphene/ The World's Smallest Car/ Force Tester/ Composite Cans
programme.desc: Featured: graphene; world's smallest car; force testers; composite cans.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Hunting Ted Bundy
programme.desc: The hunt is on for notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. As he unleashes his trail of terror in the Pacific Northwest, investigators are coming closer to discovering the monster behind the murders, and putting him away for life.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Hunting Ted Bundy
programme.desc: The hunt is on for notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. As he unleashes his trail of terror in the Pacific Northwest, investigators are coming closer to discovering the monster behind the murders, and putting him away for life.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: In-Laws and Outlaws
programme.desc: A law professor gunned down in Tallahassee. Suspects arrested clear across the state one of them a reputed gang leader. And the question what was the connection? A tangled web of relationships and cash deposits place a family under the microscope.

programme.title: Betrayed: Final Curtain
programme.desc: From devoted mother, to passionate lover to larger-than-life stage actress, forty-year-old Pasinetta Prince plays many roles in her life and she relishes the spotlight. Until a personal betrayal draws the final curtain and ends her life.

programme.title: Betrayed: Keep Your Friends Close…
programme.desc: 32-year-old Anna Lisa Raymundo seems to have it all a skyrocketing career, a beautiful home and a loving boyfriend. But a secret betrayal cuts her dreams of a family short.

programme.title: True Conviction: Death Undercover
programme.desc: Young mother Nancy Klinger goes missing after telling friends she's going undercover on a black market baby sting.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: When a high school sophomore is found brutally raped and murdered, the clock is ticking as Las Vegas Police hunt a monster.

programme.title: True Conviction: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A 59 year old grandmother is discovered beaten and stabbed to death in her home on Mother's Day.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mom's Money
programme.desc: Most children value their mother's enduring love, but few are only concerned with a different kind of maternal support: money. These Deadly Women prove all they care about is ''Mom's Money''.

programme.title: Deadly Women: DIY Orphans
programme.desc: For these women blood isn't thicker than water. A teen sacrifices her family for an early inheritance; an obsession with Hollywood memorabilia leads a recluse to kill her parents; and a soccer mom's social status is more important than her mother's life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Bury Their Babies
programme.desc: A mother's impulse to love and protect her child is a sentiment hard-wired into the brain, but these deadly women go against the most primal and basic instinct to protect their young.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Pity
programme.desc: A mother who wants another baby is prepared to steal from the womb; a grandmother's outward devotion masks her sadistic nature.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lady of Blood
programme.desc: Lizzie Borden, American most infamous murderess. Born into a wealthy respected family, Lizzie was a quiet, Sunday school teacher - that is until she took an ax and hacked her stepmother and and father to death. Or did she?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mommy's Little Helpers
programme.desc: The mother-son relationship is a dynamic one, and these deadly women taught their sons to hate and kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mothers Who Kill
programme.desc: These stories will shock you and make you wonder what would drive a woman to murder her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Beyond Repair
programme.desc: Twenty-six year old blonde beauty, Leah Ward, brings sparkle back into the eyes of 40-year old divorcee and entrepreneur, Ejaz Ahmad. But when Ejaz disappears only months later, it's his young son who leads the path to a grisly discovery and murder.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: The Real Don of New York
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York. When FBI realised their mistake, they would stop at nothing to take him down.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: The Real Don of New York
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York. When FBI realised their mistake, they would stop at nothing to take him down.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.
