programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Steaks: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this show on 'budget' steaks with new ways of cooking his favourite: top sirloin steak. Then there's a close look at why we 'flip' meat and a new angle on the broiler.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Bird In The Pan: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this classic roast chicken episode with new flavours, new science and a strange new twist on 'broiling'.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione vs. Wong
programme.desc: Chefs Marc Forgione and Lee Anne Wong face-off in this Halloween themed episode.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto Vs. Hines
programme.desc: Chef Makoto Okuwa, a former sous chef to Iron Chef Morimoto enters Kitchen Stadium for the first time as a challenger to Iron Chef Michael Symon. Will Okuwa break under the pressure of leading his own team?

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon Vs. Goldman

programme.title: Unique Eats: Americana
programme.desc: Classic American fare gets the royal treatment at these extraordinary spots. Heavy-Metal inspired burgers piled high with the works and mouth-watering, stick-to-your-ribs barbecue in Brooklyn are featured.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Italian
programme.desc: Classic Italian meets passion, authenticity and innovation at these noteworthy restaurants. Vetri has been called one of the best Italian restaurants in America, presenting simple, fresh, authentic Italian dishes.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Cupcakes
programme.desc: We'll take you from coast to coast to taste the most unique cupcakes in the country. Indulge in artisanal cupcakes paired with beer and wine; stuff yourself with custard-filled cupcakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: San Fran Sweet Treats
programme.desc: We found three San Francisco restaurants that stand out in this foodie paradise. At Craftsman & Wolves, chef William Werner's attention to detail creates edible works of art like the Caramel Cube Cake that is actually spray-painted.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Grown-up Goodies
programme.desc: In Portland, Ore., an ice cream shop adds cocktails to the mix-ins. In Healdsberg, Calif., the area's bountiful produce finds its way into hyper-seasonal cupcakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Portland Sweets
programme.desc: Portland is one city at the forefront of the food scene using local ingredients with a unique spin.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Garfield
programme.desc: Four incredible cake artists compete to have their creations at the center of a party celebrating everyone's favorite lasagna-obsessed cat.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Where's Waldo
programme.desc: Get ready for a globe-trotting adventure as Cake Wars takes on Where's Waldo. Four amazing bakers battle it out to have their cake creations at the center of a party celebrating Where's Waldo.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Orleans
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the Big Easy where the food and the culture are a mix of southern tradition and modern influence.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party
programme.desc: Pearl tries to get ready for a slumber party despite Mr. Krabs' meddling.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Pat takes SpongeBob on as his role model; Bob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys
programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Mutation Situation
programme.desc: When Shredder teams with the Kraang to receive a batch of mutagen, the Turtles' problems only get worse - even putting their friendship with April at stake.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Follow the Leader
programme.desc: When the Turtles face Shredder's newest threat, an army of Robot Foot Soldiers, Karai captures Leonardo and forces him to do battle with these new and improved ninjas that can adapt to his every move.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Invasion of the Squirrelanoids
programme.desc: While tracking mutagen, the Turtles bring a mutated squirrel back to the lair. When it starts multiplying, the Turtles must hunt the squirrel mutants and prevent them escaping into the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutagen Man Unleashed
programme.desc: Donatello obsessively experiments with mutagen in a bid to find a cure for April's mutated father. Unfortunately this puts April in danger from a new threat-Mutagen Man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mikey Gets Shellacne
programme.desc: Michelangelo is tired of being the 'runt of the litter.' But when he fools around with some mutagen, he gets a dangerous infection that is mutating out of control.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Target: April O'Neil
programme.desc: April tries to resume a normal teenage life, but when Karai starts hunting her again, April realizes she may have put her new friend Casey Jones in danger as well.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Under the Volcano!
ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: My Sister the Weirdo/ Turf War
programme.desc: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her upcoming party so she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows: Alvin. Needing to find a part time job, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sister Act/ Lil' T
programme.desc: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Albrittina/ Simon for President
programme.desc: When Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate, he decides to do the same and prove just how silly the test really is. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Back to the Danger
programme.desc: When Drex prevents young Ray from ever being densitized in the past, Henry and a now destructible Ray must take on Drex and help Ray get back his indestructibility.

programme.title: Danger Force: Quaran-Kini Special

programme.title: The Thundermans: Call of Lunch Duty
programme.desc: Phoebe discovers that Max is the anonymous figure behind the latest rebellious pranks at school, but when she refuses to give up his secret to the principal, she must face the consequences.

programme.title: The Thundermans: One Hit Thunder

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Girl with the Dragon Snafu
programme.desc: Phoebe joins the 'cool' group for a class project, only to find that they do not want to work as hard as she does. Max takes Phoebe's usual spot in her friends' group, and tries to coast by letting them do all the work.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Octo-Charlotte/ Trouble in Tropikini

programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.desc: Baymax brings Hiro to Obake’s lair, where Obake reveals his plans to recreate the Great Catastrophe and wipe out San Fransokyo.

programme.desc: 'Nova' investigates the secrets behind the building of some of mankind's most spectacular architecture: cathedrals. Built from millions of pounds of stone, some are at risk of collapsing as scientists rush to unlock their secrets and save them.

programme.title: History Detectives: Lauste Film Clip, Baker's Gold, Transatlantic Cable
programme.desc: A collector believes he has a clip from the first ever talking picture. Wes Cowan explores Gold Rush territory. A Cape Cod beachcomber finds what he believes is a section of the first transatlantic cable.

programme.title: Ancient Skies: Gods and Monsters
programme.desc: Explore the origins of our relationship with the skies. Our ancestors used the sky to navigate and tell time, and gave religious significance to what they saw in it. Then, a revolution gave birth to modern science.

programme.title: Secrets of the Dead: Building Notre Dame
programme.desc: An in-depth investigation into the centuries-long construction of Notre Dame de Paris.

programme.title: Nova: Building the Great Cathedrals
programme.desc: 'Nova' investigates the secrets behind the building of some of mankind's most spectacular architecture: cathedrals. Built from millions of pounds of stone, some are at risk of collapsing as scientists rush to unlock their secrets and save them.

programme.title: Genius by Stephen Hawking: Where Did the Universe Come From?
programme.desc: Scientist Stephen Hawking challenges three ordinary people to work out where the universe came from. Hawking leads the trio on an extraordinary journey of discovery featuring racing cars, ice-skaters, balloons and running tracks.

programme.title: The Great American Read: Other Worlds
programme.desc: Take a magical journey to another world through some of America's best-loved novels. From Middle Earth to Lilliput, the trials and tribulations of these alternate universes help us to better understand our own world.

programme.title: Eric Idle's 'The Entire Universe'
programme.desc: In his quest to unlock the secrets of the universe, Idle is ably assisted by Brian Cox, Warwick Davis, Noel Fielding, Robin Ince and Hannah Waddingham, with an appearance from Tim Peake.

programme.title: The Roosevelts: An Intimate History: The Common Cause (1939-1944)
programme.desc: FDR shatters the third-term tradition, struggles to prepare a reluctant country to enter World War II and, after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, helps set the course toward Allied victory.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Benson and Barba ask witnesses to put their jobs on the line after a news anchor makes an on-air allegation of rape against her boss.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Real Fake News
programme.desc: A congressman is falsely accused of soliciting underage girls and he asks SVU for help debunking the rumour. The investigation leads to a real sex-trafficking ring. Meanwhile, Benson and Rollins find themselves targets of a malicious website.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Gone Fishin'
programme.desc: When Fin crosses international borders to catch a fugitive rapist, a political tug-of-war derails Barba's legal case. Meanwhile, shocking allegations against Benson lead to the return of an old friend.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Contrapasso
programme.desc: A man is found castrated and left for dead and the SVU team uncovers three possible suspects with motives. Meanwhile, trouble is brewing for Benson.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead leading Rollins to go undercover at the last place she was seen alive, a high-end rehab center. Meanwhile, Benson tries to overcome her doubts about Sheila.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Something Happened
programme.desc: Benson must disclose secrets of her past to help an assault victim recall details of a traumatic night.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Gone Baby Gone
programme.desc: Emotions run high as the SVU squad searches for Benson's missing son.

programme.title: Modern Family: Written in the Stars
programme.desc: Phil thinks that Gloria is upset at Jay for dropping the ball on Valentine's Day, so he convinces Jay to spice things up with a little role playing that doesn't go off as planned.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spanks for the Memories
programme.desc: When Jay overhears Gloria on the phone talking about spanking, he assumes she is frustrated in the bedroom. When he attempts to light the spark again by giving her exactly what she wants, he realizes he might have made a mistake.

programme.title: Modern Family: Wine Weekend
programme.desc: The family goes on a wine tasting trip and stays in Haley's new boss' country house where the only rule is: Don't touch the tiara! Meanwhile, Gloria and Mitch are invited to a party at Oprah's house but can't bring anyone else.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clash of Swords
programme.desc: Mitchell sneaks out to 'Hero-Con' with fanboy Phil, dressed as their favourite characters from the show 'Clash of Swords.' It's great until Phil commits the ultimate fan faux pas.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Retail Therapy
programme.desc: Faye's doting over Todd becomes a problem. Savannah misses playing football and joins a team.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Something Old, Something Nude
programme.desc: Savannah is caught between Nic and Todd when wedding planning. Faye reconnects with an old friend.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wednesday's Child
programme.desc: A young diabetic boy goes missing from his bed, and time is running out to get him insulin. A criminal couple known for producing child pornography is spotted with the boy, but they are not willing to help the investigation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Holden's Manifesto
programme.desc: A bike messenger creates a video diary of his trouble with women. Talk soon escalates to action, and the SVU scrambles to find his manifesto before he commits another violent act.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Undercover Mother
programme.desc: Working undercover to bust a sex trafficking ring, Detective Carisi stumbles upon a mother who has embedded herself as a Madame in the organization for three years in hopes of finding and saving her daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Maternal Instincts
programme.desc: Rollins' mother Beth throws her a baby shower while the SVU reports to a four-star hotel where a famous violinist was raped by her colleague. The investigation leads to the shocking return of Rollins' sister Kim.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Monster in the Box
programme.desc: Grissom is shocked to discover that the miniature killer is still at large and has sent a miniature forewarning of slayings to occur the next day. Grissom laments that he delayed the investigation by being on sabbatical when the unmarked package arrived.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Leipei
programme.desc: When a man is murdered by a small drone, the team discovers his connection to a terrorist group that is planning another local attack. With time running short, Nell must use her drone expertise to try to divert a disaster in Long Beach.

programme.title: NCIS: Swan Song
programme.desc: After new evidence reveals that the port-to-port killer has infiltrated the agency, the NCIS team chases every lead in a race to track him down.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get My Cigarettes
programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge
programme.desc: Commander Fischer updates Voight on a missing officer that Narcotics had deep undercover with a robbery crew. Burgess and Roman deal with a squatter.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Say Her Real Name
programme.desc: With a World Trade conference in Chicago, all members of intelligence are undercover in various protest groups to determine potential threats.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get Back to Even

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Three G's

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Number of Rats

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: There's My Girl

programme.desc: A fifth-grade boy born with a rare facial deformity begins his first ever day of school with trepidation. Due to his frequent surgeries, up until now he's been home schooled by his parents, who worry about the other children's reactions to his appearance.

programme.desc: Their new country home proves to be a battleground for the Ricardos and their son.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Raises Chickens
programme.desc: The Mertzes find a way to stay with the Ricardos but Lucy's chickens have her in trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Does the Tango
programme.desc: Practicing the tango for Little Ricky's school gets the Ricardo's and Mertzes a feuding.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ragtime Band
programme.desc: Lucy decides to take part in a fundraising campaign.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Ma Makes Three
programme.desc: Feeling sorry for a lonely Sophia, Dorothy allows her to come along on a date with her and Dorothy's latest beau. However, pretty soon Sophia begins tagging along on every date which puts a rift in Dorothy's romantic plans.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Larceny and Old Lace
programme.desc: Sophia's latest boyfriend, Rocco, claims to have been involved in the mob. When the girls discover a bag of Rocco's with thousands of dollars in it, they assume he robbed a bank.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose's Big Adventure
programme.desc: Rose's latest boyfriend has just retired and she is ready to spend a whole lot more time with him, but his retirement quickly turns him into a couch potato. Meanwhile, the girls deal with remodeling the garage into a guest room.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mixed Blessing
programme.desc: Dorothy's son, Michael, pays another visit and this time he has an announcement: he's engaged. However, Dorothy has two more surprises in store.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mister Terrific
programme.desc: Rose begins to date 'Mr. Terrific', a kiddie show host, who gets fired when Dorothy gets a part-time job as a consultant on the show, a job he helped her get.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mother's Day
programme.desc: While waiting for phone calls from their children wishing them a happy Mother's Day, the girls reminisce about past Mother's Days.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Marg Helgenberger from 'A Dog's Journey' stops by. 'The Burn Cookbook' authors, Jonathan Bennett and Nikki Martin prepare their Queen beet-za. 'The Possibility Mom' author, Lisa Canning helps moms be less stressed.

programme.title: Movie: Eat, Play, Love
programme.desc: A veterinarian makes it her habit to stop by the local dog shelter whenever she can. She does this not only because of her love for dogs, but also because she is secretly in love with the shelter owner.

programme.title: Movie: Date With Love
programme.desc: After a-list actress, Alex Allen, has an epic Hollywood meltdown, she is in need of some positive publicity. Salvation comes in the form of a small town boy's video 'promposal' in which the student invites Alex to prom.

programme.title: Movie: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Movie: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: NASCAR driver Ricky Bobby's talent and devotion are put to the test when a French Formula One driver challenges him for the Championship.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: A small-town pizzeria owner unexpectedly inherits a vast fortune from a distant relative.

programme.title: Movie: Blended
programme.desc: After a terrible blind date, two single parents are horrified to learn that they're sharing a suite at a resort for families where they've taken their respective kids on holiday.

programme.title: Movie: Call Your Mother
programme.desc: An ode to moms and the way they have shaped the work of some of comedy's biggest stars.

programme.title: South Park: Moss Piglets
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy's experiment could win them first prize in the annual science fair.

programme.title: South Park: Turd Burglars
programme.desc: Kyle’s mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.

programme.title: South Park: Dead Kids

programme.title: South Park: Reverse Cowgirl
programme.desc: An unspeakable tragedy occurs when one of the boys leaves the toilet seat up.

programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Mom Is a Dirty Slut

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Mom Is Still a Dirty Slut
programme.desc: The boys and most of the town wait for Dr. Mephesto to regain consciousness and reveal the identity of Cartman's father.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Joins NAMBLA
programme.desc: Cartman suddenly finds Stan, Kenny and Kyle too immature to be his friends. He then decides to seek friendship using the Internet, where he finds an older man who is more than willing to be his 'friend.'

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure
programme.desc: To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival factions.

programme.desc: When a Chinese businesswoman is found dead on the tour bus she and her husband operate, Brenda and the squad must dig deep to investigate her past life. Meanwhile, Brenda's parents reveal to the squad that Brenda and Fritz are engaged.

programme.title: The First 48: Waterworld

programme.desc: In Charlotte, a man shoots a store clerk and father of three children in a robbery.

programme.desc: A mother is charged and sent to Death Row for allegedly murdering her two young boys in their Dallas area home.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death by the Bayou

programme.desc: Did Daniel Dougherty commit murder by arson, or did the fire science used to convict him get it wrong?

programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Tough as a Mother: LeAnn Duncan
programme.desc: Survivalists battle the Nicaraguan jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Tough as a Mother: Amal Alyassiri
programme.desc: A hurricane blasts through the camp of Amal, an Iraqi war refugee.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Honeymoon from Hell
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A married couple takes on the Philippine jungle after watching the challenge from their couch in Idaho. Their marriage and survival skills are put to the ultimate test as they battle torrential rain and deadly boars.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Don't Cave In
programme.desc: In the relentless Colombian jungle, a mom and National Guard vet teams with a firefighter. Violent storms and hypothermic conditions force them to huddle in bat-infested caves. A special bond develops between a survivalist and a wild monkey.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Tough as a Mother: Leah McCabe
programme.desc: Instant attraction gives way to unforgiving conditions on a Nicaraguan island teeming with bull sharks and big cats.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Don't Cave In
programme.desc: In the relentless Colombian jungle, a mom and National Guard vet teams with a firefighter. Violent storms and hypothermic conditions force them to huddle in bat-infested caves. A special bond develops between a survivalist and a wild monkey.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Biting Back At Africa
programme.desc: In a unique four-person challenge, a lion attack survivor returns to Africa to face her fears. Surrounded by lions, crocodiles and cape buffalo, the tribe of four struggles against constant threats and each other as they try to survive in a kill zone.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Harris Legacy
programme.desc: The discovery of mysterious fishing charts on the Cornelia Maria leads co-captains Josh Harris and Casey McManus to Hawaii to learn what Josh's late father, Captain Phil Harris, was attempting to accomplish decades ago.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.title: Texas Metal: Cab Over Custom, Part One
programme.desc: Bill and the team try to outdo themselves with a radical redesign of 1950 Ford F5 COE, starting with a bed unlike any they've built. The shop begins its first shot at remaking a '69 Corvette Stingray by building a custom chassis.

programme.title: Texas Metal: Cab Over Custom, Part Two
programme.desc: In Texas, you don't just go big, you go bigger. The team does that on the year-long 1950 Ford F5 COE build when the client asks for a last-minute Cummins diesel engine swap. A twisted graphic wraps up a months-long 2001 Ford F350.

programme.title: Texas Metal: The Family Falcon
programme.desc: Bill knows all too well that families are the lifeblood of the custom truck scene. A customer wants to transform a 1965 Ford Falcon Club Wagon into a fully custom family cruiser. A 1966 Cobra replica gets reinforced.

programme.title: Texas Metal: Re-Dually
programme.desc: Bill and the team fix another shop's mistakes when a 2017 F-350 is hauled into the shop broken and undrivable due to a botched lift. Plus, a client insists on the ultimate tailgating BBQ trailer with custom everything.

programme.title: Texas Metal: Bolt-On Is a Dirty Word
programme.desc: Bill looks to the year 2073 when the owner of a '73 El Camino challenges the shop to transform his vehicle into the Ride of the Future. The city wants a custom bumper on a 2020 Freightliner tow truck that can push 45,000 pounds.

programme.title: Texas Metal: Big Diesel and Drag Truck
programme.desc: A 1937 International Harvester gets a big old Cummins 12-valve diesel engine that's as heavy as the truck itself. A 2005 Chevy Colorado gets a new lease on life as a nitrous-infused drag truck.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Hotheads and Hotrods
programme.desc: Fresh off their huge win against NOLA, JJ Da Boss and the MSO hit the streets after getting called out by Quinn Shireman and his team from Kentucky. Quinn has a big mouth and the fast cars to back it up, forcing the MSO to go all hands on deck for a win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Kentucky Fried Finish
programme.desc: Race night against the Kentucky racers continues with JJ throwing a curveball and Kentucky falling behind. A face-to-face confrontation emerges on the course and tempers are boiling out of control but MSO is determined to prove why they're the best.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Meet Virginia
programme.desc: Race night gets rowdy when Memphis welcomes a new racing group from Virginia. The newcomers talk a big game but run out of cars after only a few races, leaving Molly and Ole Heavy without a race until Virginia can fix their cars and return.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: 35 to 1
programme.desc: The Memphis family loads up their cars and heads to Battlefield Dragway in Mississippi for one of JJ's famous arm-drop competitions. Thirty-five small-tire-car racers begin round one in this exclusive event, but only one will take home the grand prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: The Memphis Tea Party
programme.desc: JJ gets a callout from Chris Bromley and his Fox-Body Mustang drivers from Massachusetts. Chelsea is excited to race her new car and Molly is out for redemption but technical difficulties make it hard for the MSO to prove they can outrun any Mustang.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: As Michael Jordan's fame peaked to unparalleled levels in the early 1990s in the wake of consecutive NBA titles and a starring role on the Olympic 'Dream Team', he became a profoundly significant cultural figure.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: With Michael Jordan's extraordinary fame came extraordinary scrutiny, and in 1993, it all felt like it came to a head with the Chicago Bulls' pursuit of a third straight title shadowed by question marks about Jordan's gambling.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: As Michael Jordan pushes his teammates hard for a sixth NBA title, his intensity and hunger for basketball dominance is in stark contrast to his mindset in October 1993, when he stunned the world by walking away from the game.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Michael Jordan would famously use even the smallest slight imaginable to motivate himself against an opponent. And when his NBA comeback in 1995 fell short in the playoffs, he worked harder than ever to return to form.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Don't Feed the Bears
programme.desc: Officer Joe Canfield investigates a home with multiple bear feeding complaints and finds more than he bargained for. Officer Egan investigates an abandoned car and missing persons case. And Officers respond to a drowning in the Connecticut River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Boiling Point

programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have from shot the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Seeing Stars and Stripes
programme.desc: It's summertime in Texas. Game Wardens handle a speeding jet ski, drunk boaters, angry campers, and a rowdy raccoon.

programme.title: Killer Hornet Invasion: They're Here ...

programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have from shot the road.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Don't Mess With Texas

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Trespassers Beware

programme.title: Killer Hornet Invasion: They're Here ...

programme.desc: The Kilchers band together to protect their livelihood on the homestead and beyond. Atz Lee and Jane encounter disaster in a hunt for Jane's first black bear. Atz Sr., Bonnie and Shane defend the head of the bay against grizzlies.

programme.title: Home Town: A Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are eager to welcome a new pediatrician who hopes to settle down with his wife and work in the beautiful community. The couple wants a historical charmer with room to grow and a spacious outdoor area for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Home Away From Home
programme.desc: A couple wants a vacation home that's big enough to entertain but manageable to maintain. After showing them a 1920s cottage and a 1912 Craftsman, Ben and Erin create the perfect getaway for them with a large chef's kitchen.

programme.desc: With just weeks left to move out of their house in California, a couple are under intense pressure to find a new home in Tucson, Arizona. They couple has three children, including two with special needs, making for a very specific wish list.

programme.desc: Min Star and Jasmine Roth take part in a video call to catch up on all things work, projects and new babies. Jasmine is pregnant with her first child and seeks advice from Mina. Balancing work and motherhood is tough, but these moms aren't slowing down.

programme.desc: Newlyweds are on the hunt for a home with a view in Great Exuma where they can escape when he returns from overseas military duty.

programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs transform the a family's historic, 1893 house. From turning an attic space into two bedrooms to completely renovating the kitchen and living area, they pull out all the stops to give the family of five their first home.

programme.desc: A married couple owns a wine bar and loves to entertain, but their home's not quite ready for guests due to its compartmentalized layout, unstable balconies and an enormous, rotting tree.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hello Nurse

programme.desc: A Colt Paterson revolver pops into the shop, as well as a 1955 GMC truck. Later, life imitates art when a guy brings in an animation cel from the 1960s cartoon 'Tennessee Tuxedo and His Tales.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: King of Pain
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are a man down when Corey arrives at work with an injured hand and ankle. Rick brushes up on contemporary art when an oil painting by Jim Daly comes into the shop. The guys also get a custom built Harley Davidson rat bike.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Reach for Raphael
programme.desc: A print believed to be from Renaissance master Raphael comes into the shop. Then, Corey gets rocked when a 1970s Ibanez guitar is brought in. Later, Corey and Chum try to find out the contents of Rick's will.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: One Man's Junk
programme.desc: A baseball believed to have been signed by the 1959 World Series Champion Dodgers comes in to the shop. Then, Rick checks out a rare movie camera from the 1930s. Also, Old Man seeks revenge when Rick bans junk food in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Triple Axel Pawn
programme.desc: Jam out with the Pawn Stars when a custom Fender quad guitar rocks into the shop. Then, a Wheaties box featuring Tonya Harding skates in. Rick feels the weight of it all when he checks out two steelyard scales from the 1700s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: All Pawns on Deck
programme.desc: 18th century engravings of the Spanish Armada; explicit wax recordings from the 1890s; a 1980s transforming Coca-Cola robot can; a 1900s Teddy Roosevelt Bears Pitcher.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Napoleon Complex

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnie and Clyde

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Poképawn
programme.desc: A valuable and rare Pokémon collection finds its way to the shop and a battle ensues to determine if it's worth a buy. Also, a 1926 Dunhill Watch Lighter looks for a home in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Here's Looking At You, Pawn!
programme.desc: A first edition of the 1911 novel 'Peter Pan' finds Rick, but he’s also swept up by a piece of scrap metal from a fallen airship. A seller hopes to wow Rick with a kneeling Thepanom statue. Corey decides if a 'Casablanca' poster is worth its high price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ultimate Fighting Pawn
programme.desc: An antique high wheel bike captivates Rick. Chum sells one of Rick's beloved Japanese katanas to UFC President Dana White. Rick heads out to look at a beautifully-restored grand piano from the 1800s. An original Walkman cassette player stops by.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick and the Heartbreakers

programme.title: Raven's Home: Big Trouble in Little Apartment
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Raven, Nia is starting to feel like their apartment isn't big enough for everyone and turns to her dad Devon for help.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Hard Hat Diggity Dog! / Hair-Raising Helpers!
programme.desc: Mickey and friends go on adventures around Hot Dog Hills.

programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Case of the Chiseling Chiselers / A Patchwork Mystery
programme.desc: When the royal sword goes missing, Mira agrees to help Veer find it. Then, when a tapestry that Priya created for Jalpur's anniversary celebration winds up nowhere to be found, Mira sets out on the case to find it before the party begins.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Mickey Monkey
programme.desc: When a mischievous monkey impersonates Mickey, Mickey must convince his pals that the monkey is an imposter.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Robostus

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Sapotis
programme.desc: Alya's little sisters get akumatized into small, out-of-control monsters named Sapotis who wreak havoc in Paris. Epic babysitting session ahead for Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Raven's Home: Cali Dreams

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friday Night Tights

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Black Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Black Pyramid is the strange, crumbling pyramid that collapsed before its pharaoh was ever buried here, and today, it's largely unexplored. Special access to a hi-tech archaeological investigation reveals what went so catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Pyramid Code
programme.desc: Ancient pyramids are among the greatest wonders of the world and exist across many civilizations. Explore the origins of these structures as experts question if they were independently constructed or perhaps the design of something more mysterious.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Black Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Black Pyramid is the strange, crumbling pyramid that collapsed before its pharaoh was ever buried here, and today, it's largely unexplored. Special access to a hi-tech archaeological investigation reveals what went so catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Pyramid Code
programme.desc: Ancient pyramids are among the greatest wonders of the world and exist across many civilizations. Explore the origins of these structures as experts question if they were independently constructed or perhaps the design of something more mysterious.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Lost Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Phantom Island
programme.desc: When an island off the coast of Mexico suddenly disappears, government officials scramble to find an explanation; cutting-edge technology might reveal if the strange place was destroyed by a foreign power or if it existed at all.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness
programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New discoveries lead investigators to a crypt rumored to hold the Ark of the Covenant. When great white shark is killed, experts suspect a mysterious ocean monster. Strange markings in the desert might be a tribute to an ancient spider god.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The King at Roswell
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the site of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of America's most famous faces.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: She Can't Hide
programme.desc: Beautiful Elisa Redelsberger appears eager to start a new life when she meets softhearted lawyer and devoted father, Larry McNabney. But few suspect the depth of evil behind Elisa's façade until she pulls off the ultimate disappearing act.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: A Murder You Can't Ignore
programme.desc: Successful and newly single, Colleen Batten is having a hard time starting over when she bumps into old flame, Bob Harris. She plans to change her luck with this father of three. His kids soon find out just how evil Colleen can really be.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Caught in Her Crosshairs
programme.desc: After a string of failed relationships, Veronica thinks single dad, Russ, is the answer to her prayers. As long as his daughter, Kimberly, doesn't get in the way. As their family grows, so does this stepmother's rage and everyone is in her crosshairs.

programme.title: A Mother's Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A violet intruder interrupts the peaceful life of a first-time mom on Mother's Day.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Nightmare in Northport
programme.desc: Narleen Campton was found viciously beaten to death in her own home after she didn't contact her daughter Sabrina on Thanksgiving. Who would want to murder the 62-year-old grandmother? The investigation unravels a murky world of drugs and violence.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Salt in the Wound
programme.desc: An independent young woman starting out in life on her own, becomes the victim of a bizarre and vicious homicide in her apartment.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Shifting Stories
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman vanishes, investigators must sort through a series of puzzling clues to solve a deadly mystery.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Nightmare in Northport
programme.desc: Narleen Campton was found viciously beaten to death in her own home after she didn't contact her daughter Sabrina on Thanksgiving. Who would want to murder the 62-year-old grandmother? The investigation unravels a murky world of drugs and violence.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Salt in the Wound
programme.desc: An independent young woman starting out in life on her own, becomes the victim of a bizarre and vicious homicide in her apartment.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Lethal Offer
programme.desc: A deadly predator leaves a trail of destruction in his wake, and a teenage girl holds the key to solving this case.

programme.title: A Mother's Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A violet intruder interrupts the peaceful life of a first-time mom on Mother's Day.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: This is Not a Drill
programme.desc: It was an ordinary day at Chardon High School in Ohio, full of the fights, laughs and boisterous behaviour that fill the corridors of any high school. But all that changes when one young man shows up with violence on his mind.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: I Speak For Amy
programme.desc: College athlete Kayleigh Ballantyne is returning home one night when she is violently attacked. As she battles for her life, she is unaware that elsewhere in the city an investigation is already underway following the discovery of a young woman's body.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Design
programme.desc: 27-year-old single mom Laura Ackerson is looking to make a fresh start in Raleigh, North Carolina. She starts a new company and new relationships while battling for custody of her two young children. She also meets her untimely demise.

programme.title: Betrayed: Flirting With Death
programme.desc: Single mom Norma Rodriguez thinks she's found Prince Charming – until she's confronted by his crazy ex. On top of that, her best friend asks her to hide a deadly secret, and a co-worker reveals a shady past… all leading to her brutal murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blinded by Betrayal
programme.desc: Yelena Zakin's dream life is upturned by her husband Andrew's interest in his new, scheming secretary, her strange fiancé, and Andrew's ambitious protégé. For Yelena, it's a lethal combination.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hells Bells
programme.desc: Rhonda Smith is a beautiful, single woman who relies on the kindness of strangers at her new church to make her way in the world - until one of them strays from the path of righteousness and betrays her.

programme.title: Betrayed: Motel Hell
programme.desc: Driven by youth, music, and her faith, Janet Chandler has dreams and aspirations of a life much larger than the small Midwestern town where she grew up. Sadly, those dreams are cut short when she's betrayed in the most horrific way possible.

programme.title: Betrayed: Welcome to the Murderhood
programme.desc: 40-year-old Priscilla Strole is looking for a fresh start when she and her teenage son Kyle move to the small town of Fairfield, California. Little does she know, new beginnings lead to her untimely end.

programme.title: Betrayed: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: 17-year-old Mary Jayne Jones is full of nubile innocence when she moves to small town Iowa and gets a job waiting tables. She trusts that there's good in everyone... but she's wrong. And it's a mistake that will cost Jayne her life.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Double Cross
programme.desc: Four best friends, two married couples, multiple sordid secrets, one huge betrayal and a murder. With exclusive interviews and never-before-aired home movie footage, this is a story about how a love affair resulted in a crime of passion.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Broadcast
programme.desc: After a taping of their local-access TV show in rural Vermont, Chrissy and Charlie Billis have a terrible accident, smashing their car into a tree. Only one survives. But tapes from the couple's TV show suggest a sinister tale behind what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Two Families
programme.desc: Unraveling the mystery behind the confusing evidence at the scene of April Holton's tragic murder.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France

programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Contemporary Elegance
programme.desc: Juan and Katy's huge backyard is empty and boring. They long for more living space. Matt adds a huge gravel patio as well as a huge, modern pergola with room for a dining and lounging area. Plants, shrubs and a bocce ball court jazz up the space.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Louwers Job
programme.desc: Michael and Courtney Louwers just bought the perfect house. The home is in a neighborhood they love and right across the street from their children's' school. Everything is perfect about their new place except the hideously outdated kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Meyer Job
programme.desc: Dan and Amanda want to turn their outdated, cramped kitchen into a modern space.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Ellis Job
programme.desc: Charles Ellis loves his house but hates his nasty, old kitchen. So he calls in his friend Jimmy to help him give it a face-lift. They plan to demo the entire kitchen and rebuild it from the floor up, but run in to trouble from the beginning.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Anderson Job
programme.desc: Greg and Lisa Anderson are not fans of the current style of their dark, outdated kitchen. The country cottage cabinets and lack of natural lighting convinces the couple to take on their biggest renovation project yet.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Switzky Job
programme.desc: Bryant Switzky and his wife, Karissa, want to open up their tiny, outdated kitchen, so they decide to renovate it together. Even though Karissa is pregnant, they are both determined to keep going.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Gomez Job
programme.desc: Emerson and Sarah Gomez love the location of their California home, but hate the outdated guest bathroom. They want to rip everything out and give it a fresh, new, spa-like feel.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Viva! Vienna! Festival/ Contra Band Days Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Virginia for creamy crab dip and discovers the secret to authentic crawfish gumbo in Louisiana.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Portland Rose Festival and Got to Be NC Fair
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe is in Portland to try beef tongue tacos. He then heads to North Carolina for a donut sloppy Joe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The French Toast Connection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the San Diego County fair in California, for breakfast with a bang, indulging in French toast bacon bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the annual Rio Rancho Pork and Brew festival in New Mexico.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Children of the Corn on the Cob

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Unexpected Hits
programme.desc: Each area of the world has its own distinct food culture, so it's always enticing when a rogue dish becomes a hit. Whether it's spring rolls in Puerto Rico or a delectable Napoleon in Georgia's Golden Isles, Katie Lee uncovers these unique eats.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Every Day Is Fry Day!
programme.desc: Join Katie Lee on her mission to find the best golden-fried goodness the beach has to offer. She heads to South Carolina for local fish, shrimp and crab cakes that are battered and crisped for the perfect Fried Seafood Platter.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Stuffed
programme.desc: Katie Lee shares the most stuffed, packed full, brimming to the rim dishes because the more, the merrier. In Florida, Katie finds amazing Empanadas and more.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Beachside Breakfasts
programme.desc: There's nothing like breakfast by the water to get any beachgoer's day started. Katie Lee finds the best coffee and papaya bowl Oahu's North Shore has to offer.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Grilled and Que'd
programme.desc: Nothing goes better with beachin' than a little grillin' and que'in'. The dishes are diverse but they all boast that amazing flavor and char that fire brings to the table. In Arizona, Katie Lee joins a local chef to grill up a striper.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Gettin' Spicy
programme.desc: Katie scours the beach searching for the spiciest dishes and isn't disappointed in San Diego where her heat index is tested after trying thirty-seven different levels.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch on Bourbon Street
programme.desc: Bobby Flay pays tribute to America's tastiest block with a brunch for Bourbon Street.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Winter Weekend Brunch
programme.desc: It may be chilly outside his kitchen, but inside Bobby Flay prepares a warm and hearty brunch that's perfect for entertaining on those cold weekend mornings.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bold Southwestern Brunch
programme.desc: A Southwestern brunch includes Texas eggs benedict and cast iron home fries.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Springtime Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby prepares a perfect springtime brunch for any family gathering. Inspired by hot cross buns, he makes spiced raisin pancakes and rum raisin cream cheese.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Chefs' Favorite Foods
programme.desc: Earl Campbell and Michael dig into juicy brisket and warm peach cobbler at Texas' most famous barbecue restaurants.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Mountains Of Meat
programme.desc: Michael Symon meets a chef bringing the Indian street food flavors of his childhood to Asheville, N.C., with his own take on a sloppy joe that he calls a Sloppy Jai, with lamb hash and 30 Indian spices.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime Bbq
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ohio State Fair/ North Carolina Potato Festival
programme.desc: In Ohio, Noah tries the pulled pork donut and goes fishing in North Carolina for Calabash flounder.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Indiana State Fair/ Old Canal Days
programme.desc: At the Indiana State Fair, Noah Cappe devours a colossal grilled cheese sandwich and a fried elephant ear filled with fruit and Greek tomato balls. At Old Canal Days in Illinois, he samples loaded potato bites, Chicago-style pizza pie and a donut treat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Royals and the Red River City
programme.desc: Noah begins his journey at the Royal Winter Fair in Toronto, Canada, where he says "yes, cheese" to the blue balsamic. Later, he ends his culinary adventure at the State Fair of Louisiana with the sweet Not Yo' Average Nachos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Lights and Literature
programme.desc: Noah tries his hand at making a deep fried root beer float and torches a berry brulee waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burgers and Bombs
programme.desc: Start the season off right with whacky takes on some fairground classics, with The Waffle Burger and the Donut Philly Cheesesteak. 'Zanado Fries and a S'mores Cobbler round off the day.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cowboys and Cakes
programme.desc: Noah joins the crowd of the Fort Worth Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas to experience the meaty Cowboy Burrito and the Texas Juicy Lucy.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.desc: Luna Girl creates a giant moonball and hides all the toys she’s stolen inside.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a butterfly get home to its family in Mexico. The pugs push Bob's office chair to a theater to see his favorite play.

programme.desc: When Donald complains everyone is in his way, Mickey and pals help him build his own clubhouse.

programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.desc: Goofy along with Mickey are on the search for the Zoo animals Goofy let escape from work.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mystery
programme.desc: When Minnie's freshly baked muffins disappear the gang set out to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Brand New Clubhouse
programme.desc: When Donald complains everyone is in his way, Mickey and pals help him build his own clubhouse.

programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.desc: As the Bey Carnival heats up, Arman and Ashindra take the stage against Joe Lazure and Joker; will they meet the same fate as the other Victories members before them?

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
