programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Wasabi Warriors
programme.desc: A cafeteria food fight leads a group of underdogs from the Bobby Wasabi Martial Arts Academy to meet Jack. When Jack flies through the wall of the dojo in perfect stance, the gang knows they have found the person who can restore their dojo's glory.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Swords and Magic
programme.desc: Milton needs help when his LARPing troop abandons him and the crew steps in to support him, applying their martial arts skills in the battle.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Dojo Day Afternoon
programme.desc: When Arthur, the obnoxious son of the owner of the mall, joins the Bobby Wasabi dojo, Rudy bends over backwards to please him. But Arthur rubs everyone the wrong way, and after an altercation with Jack, Arthur's dad demands Jack be kicked out.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Road to Wasabi
programme.desc: As a birthday present to Rudy, Jack gets Bobby Wasabi to make a surprise visit. Unfortunately, Rudy doesn't recognize his mentor and mistakenly flips him over, leading Bobby to fire Rudy on the spot.

programme.title: Kickin' It: The Commercial
programme.desc: When Rudy freaks out during an acting audition, Jack tries to help him out and ends up booking the lead role of Pomegranate Man. Meanwhile, Milton's perfect GPA is threatened when a baking assignment leads him to become a crazed tyrant chef.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Dummy Dancing
programme.desc: Truman, a bratty kid whose dad controls the mall's security, captures a video of Eddie practicing for the school dance with a punching dummy. To protect Eddie from online embarrassment, the gang sneaks into Truman's dad's office to obtain the evidence.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Ricky Weaver
programme.desc: Jack question's teen pop sensation Ricky Weaver's motives when he asks Kim to dance with him at his upcoming concert. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang for a boy banned.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Boo Gi Nights
programme.desc: The Bobby Wasabi gang is determined to stop the Black Dragons from ruining the mall's annual Halloween Boo-Stravaganza. Meanwhile, Rudy meets a mysterious woman in a cat costume.

programme.title: Kickin' It: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: Jerry signs his friends up for a dance completion before realizing they can't dance. When a competing group asks him to join them, he leaves his friends behind.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Kung Fu Cop
programme.desc: Jack dreams that he and the gang are in a '70s disco-themed detective movie. Jack must try to crack the case of sassy damsel, Snowflake Jones', missing Dragon's Eye necklace.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Wax on, Wax Off
programme.desc: The gang must do everything they can to prevent a life-sized wax statue of Bobby Wasabi from melting during a heat wave.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Badge of Honor
programme.desc: After Milton accidentally thwarts a robbery in the mall, Joan gives makes him an honorary security guard. Milton's newfound power is put to the test, however, when a band of robbers steal from the dojo.

programme.title: Kickin' It: The Wrath of Swan
programme.desc: After Jack turns down Kim's invitation to be her date at the Swan Court Cotillion Ball, she asks Brody, a new kid in school. When Jack suspects that Brody is from the Black Dragons, the gang springs into action to tell Kim the truth.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: Milton falls head over heels for the new girl in his class, but her uncle, Sensei Ty from the Black Dragons, bans them from seeing each other. Meanwhile, Eddie and Jerry vie to be the best rappers.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Bonds of Earth
programme.desc: Learn how a soccer ball from astronaut Ellison Onizuka’s daughter’s teammates at a high school in Clear Lake, Texas, survived the tragic Challenger space shuttle explosion in January 1986 and finally completed its mission to space 31 years later.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Declan's Legacy
programme.desc: Notre Dame student Declan Sullivan was killed in a fall in 2010 while filming football practice. For the first time on television, Declan's family shares their story of that time and how Declan's legacy lives on through nearly 100 Chicago children.

programme.title: E:60
programme.desc: ESPN's award-winning Sunday morning sports magazine show, featuring the biggest names and best stories in sports.

programme.title: E:60: Alex Smith: Project 11
programme.desc: An exclusive look inside Washington quarterback Alex Smith's recovery from a 2018 leg injury that nearly cost him his life. Smith opens up about flesh-eating bacteria, limb salvage measures and what it was like to throw a football again.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Drew Bledsoe: Better With Age
programme.desc: An unfiltered interview with former number one draft pick Drew Bledsoe, on living in the shadow of the Tom Brady dynasty, the tackle that nearly cost him his life and how he's found peace as a successful winemaker.

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson's investigation into a famous Hollywood divorce attorney found floating in his swimming pool is under heavy scrutiny. Meanwhile, Fritz and Brenda are trying to consolidate their bills, but Brenda discovers a secret.

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Under intense pressure, Brenda has forty-eight hours to break a new witness' alibi and get her case back on track. Meanwhile, Brenda's relationship with Fritz is in danger as secrets loom.

programme.title: The Closer: Next of Kin

programme.desc: News of Meredith's dishonesty in the clinical trial comes to light, leading to unanticipated consequences. Cristina finds herself in a compromising situation, which forces her to decide between her career and her relationship. The new Chief is revealed.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Free Falling/ She's Gone
programme.desc: Meredith faces the consequences of her actions. April tries to step up as chief resident when the hospital is flooded with patients injured in a giant sinkhole. Christina makes a tough decision about her pregnancy.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Take the Lead
programme.desc: The Chief makes a career-changing decision that shocks Seattle Grace Hospital; Cristina and Owen try to find normalcy in their relationship; April continues to struggle in her new role; and the 5th year residents are given their first solo surgeries.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: What Is It About Men
programme.desc: The doctors of Seattle Grace have to man-up when a stampede at a comic book convention causes an influx of colourful characters in the ER.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Love, Loss and Legacy
programme.desc: The residents try their hardest to impress surgical great Catherine Avery when she arrives at Seattle Grace to perform a groundbreaking transplant surgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Tale of the Tape
programme.desc: After a Delaware store clerk is murdered, a local drug dealer confesses to the crime, but there is doubt that what he said on tape can be believed.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death by the Bayou
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a disabled teenager is sentenced to death, but the discovery of hidden eyewitness interviews casts new light on his confession.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Terror in the Taxi
programme.desc: Houston taxi cab drivers become the deadly target to a couple in love with each other, power, and money.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel

programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: War for $10k

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Texas Roadhouse
programme.desc: MSO gets called out by Ronnie Pace and his team from Texas. It's not long before Memphis begins feeling the heat up against Ronnie's Texas-sized mouth and deep pockets, leaving it up to the more inexperienced racers to bring the MSO back into the black.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Texas Toast
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: MSO continues their battle with Texas and the intensity is greater than ever, meaning one false move could spell the end for Memphis.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Beat Me in St. Louis
programme.desc: The MSO heads to St. Louis to race the slick streets against a team of even slicker racers led by Dynamite Dave. Memphis came out on top the last time these teams faced off, now the St. Louis crew is ready to even the score on their home turf.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Galaxie Quest
programme.desc: The Monkeys sprint to wrap up the '68 Ford Galaxie XL before its owner comes to Dallas. Meanwhile, the guys dig through barn grime and dust to get to a '69 Camaro in Minnesota. Finally, the guys get a tempting invite from the Golden Knights.

programme.desc: Galpin takes an unseen Ed Roth show-rod out of the trash and restores it for a grand debut at the Corvette Museum. As the guys prepare for the exhibit, Beau and Dave take a trip down memory lane while riding around in the first car they rebuilt together.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Mashed Up Mustang
programme.desc: Richard trades his friend a '58 Impala for a '67 Mustang. He flips a smoking '72 Pontiac Formula 400. Aaron and the crew rush to the scene of a Gas Monkey accident.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast and Furious Fairmont
programme.desc: An ugly 1978 Ford Fairmont is turned into a cool, mirrored drift car. Richard flips a rare 1967 Corvette Stingray.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Clear and Pheasant Danger
programme.desc: The Browns take part in a competitive pheasant hunt as a way to celebrate and give thanks for everything they have.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Fowl Weather Friends
programme.desc: Birdi goes on a treacherous hunt to bring home meat for the family and save her chickens from slaughter. Later, Noah constructs an automatic diaper machine and Gabe gets bush insight from Ami that he can pass along to Raquell.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Chaos Before the Storm
programme.desc: Winter is approaching yet the Wolfpack is feeling the heat! Bear works furiously to finalize an addition to his home as Billy faces a new medical crisis. A big winter storm forces Noah and Rhain Alisha to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Big Push
programme.desc: The Brown siblings struggle to finish their ambitious homesites as the ground begins to freeze. Later, the Wolfpack gets the call that Rhain-Alisha has gone into labor and races to the birth of baby Eli.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.desc: After six years of unreliable contractors in her new home and attempting to do things herself, Peggy Lu's house has become a disaster. She needs design experts Nate Berkus and Jeremiah Brent to save her from her DIY nightmare before it's too late.

programme.desc: McKayla is back and she's having another baby. Chloe worries that Max may go to jail. Hailey is looking forward to meeting Matthew's sister. Tyra and Alex get a closer look at their baby.

programme.title: Unexpected: Five Generations of Teen Parents
programme.desc: Chloe has to miss school because Ava has pink eye. Tyra worries she's losing friends because of her pregnancy. Hailey finally meets Matthew's sister at a birthing class gone awry. And McKayla and Caelan have an argument they might not come back from.

programme.title: Unexpected: Two Haileys and a Baptism
programme.desc: Chloe worries that Max might start trouble at Ava's baptism. Tyra is in the hospital and ready to have her baby. Matthew has been texting with Hailey's best friend. Rilah gets upset when her mother moves the family an hour away from her boyfriend.

programme.title: Unexpected: Can You Get Undilated?
programme.desc: Things get scary when Tyra tries to induce. Hailey is depressed when Matthew goes MIA. Anthony's family is concerned he isn't the father of Rilah's baby. Then, Caelan doesn't believe that McKayla is actually in labour.

programme.title: Unexpected: Say Bye-Bye Daddy
programme.desc: Tyra and Alex experience parenthood for the first time. Chloe isn't sure she can stay with Max. Anthony questions the paternity of Rilah's baby. Then, a dinner with McKayla and Caelan's family goes left.

programme.title: Unexpected: Does She Have My Ears?
programme.desc: Anthony looks to prove paternity at Rilah's 4D ultrasound. Max reveals more about his addiction when he meets with a therapist. Matthew visits Hailey's house to build a crib. Tyra and Alex leave the hospital and take the baby to visit Alex's family.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some 'man dolphins,' hit some red 'bullseyes' and get wet in the category 'dammmmp Daniel.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Mark Cuban
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo are joined by Mark Cuban to learn all about investing in the Mark Tank. Next, they try to sort out the Cuban Bathroom Crisis. Things get deep as they delve into the Dangers of Dunking.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XIX
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel take a trip down to 'The Slamptons,' encounter some ancient 'sea cappys' and learn what it means to be prone to 'gingeries.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sam Sadler
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined all the way from the UK by YouTube's Sam Sadler to rock out to some 'pins and needles' and get 'scared forever.'

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mandy and Jose
programme.desc: Mandy is in love with a guy that showers her with everything but honesty. Mandy's son recruits Nev and Max to help him get the truth for his mom. A trail of clues sends them all deeper down the rabbit hole.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ramona and Paola
programme.desc: Ramon's one shining glimmer of happiness is Paola, a girl he met on Facebook and established an exclusive online relationship with.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aubri and Brian
programme.desc: Nev and Slick Woods help 19-year-old Aubri find her Snapchat love, Brian, who says he lives at Aubri's college but has shady excuses not to meet. Nev and Slick hit campus in search of answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev Schulman and Max Joseph journey cross-country to unite young couples and take their online-only romantic relationships offline to meet in person.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Shawny and Jack
programme.desc: Shawny recently went through a divorce with her husband and calls Nev and Max to help uncover the shadowy identity of her attempt at new love. The situation gets interesting as they discover that Shawny may have secrets of her own.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Hundra and Emily
programme.desc: Hundra never planned on falling in love with a girl and now she is risking coming out on national TV to learn if her love with Emily is for real. Special guest Machine Gun Kelly teams with Nev to reveal a shocking Catfish.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Larissa and Anthony
programme.desc: After being catfished by her high school best friend, Larissa turn to her online friend Anthony for support. Feelings between them grew to love, but after a few false moves on Anthony's part, Larissa is worried he too is lying.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Taylor and Christian
programme.desc: Taylor needs help after falling for a guy that claims to have gone to her high school but whom she doesn't remember. Nev and co-host Tallulah dig in to Taylor's tale only to uncover secrets more shocking than they ever expected.

programme.title: Movie: Titanic
programme.desc: Two social opposites meet and fall in love while on Titanic's maiden voyage.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren and Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek on MySpace years ago, yet they've never met in real life. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Vince and Alyssa
programme.desc: Vince's girlfriend, Liz, breaks up with him because he cannot find an escape from his online-ex, Alyssa. Nev and Max help Vince confront Alyssa, to mend his relationship with Liz.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks try to talk Barbara out of a bad deal. Kevin O'Leary takes a bet on a pet product. Other pitches include a virtual arcade and a clothing designer.

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.title: After the First 48: Bad Company

programme.title: The First 48: House of Blood/ Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Bloody footprints are found at a murder scene where the victim was brutally stabbed; a trail of blood elsewhere indicates a second victim.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Obsession/ The Killer You Know
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers embark on a manhunt after the murder of a young couple. The search for the cold-blooded killer takes them across three states. In Cleveland, a man is shot in his own backyard.

programme.title: The First 48: The Rookie/ Cornered
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Detective Justin Rice struggles to find a witness when a neighborhood is scared silent in the brazen daytime shooting of an innocent man.

programme.title: The First 48: A Killer Fight/ Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: In Mobile, a street fight escalates to a shooting that leaves a man dead in his front yard. In Tulsa, a drive-by shooting that stems from a gang feud claims the life of a 16-year-old girl, while her boyfriend clings to life.

programme.title: The First 48: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: A community is outraged when a married couple is gunned down at home in front of their two young children. As Detective Trees works his way toward a suspect, the investigation takes a shocking turn.

programme.title: The First 48: Division/ Loose Ends
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the death of a 24-year-old father-of-two shot in the street; detectives are called to the murder of a 27-year-old man found in an open field.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent: Attempted Murder or Protective Mother?

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent: One Punch Assault or Self-Defense?
programme.desc: A young man witnesses a brutal attack.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tells Terry to find the author of an anonymous firefighter blog from the station and shut it down. With everyone a suspect, no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Claims, Cans and Cabins
programme.desc: Otto, Eivin and August scramble to stake a claim on 10 tons of priceless steel on a distant beach. At the head of the bay, Atz Sr. and Bonnie team up with Atz Lee and Jane to stockpile salmon for the upcoming winter.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Journey to Perl Island
programme.desc: The Kilchers face their biggest challenges yet. Otto, Jane and Shane help a fellow homesteader transport a cabin to the distant and uninhabited Perl Island but things take a sinister turn when they discover a predator on the loose.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Blood, Sweat and Beers
programme.desc: After a winter of record-setting warm temperatures, the Kilchers team up to tame the land. Otto and Eivin tackle turning raw wilderness into a source of food for generations to come. Atz Sr. battles the elements and a menace at the head of the bay.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Mobility, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: As the Kilcher family braces for summer on the homestead, Atz Lee treks to forbidding Perl Island for an emergency crash course in wilderness survival. Jane fights with creatures from the deep for food, and Otto and Eivin attempt a homestead sauna build.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Open Season: Before Winter Strikes
programme.desc: When Otto's and Eivin's hunt for ptarmigan doesn't go as planned, Atz Lee and Jane hope to have better luck tracking caribou. Then, as winter lurks, the Kilchers prepare the homestead, and Atz Lee and Atz Sr. build a weather station on Perl Island.

programme.title: Raising Wild: A Windmill and a Prayer
programme.desc: Drastic seasonal changes force the Hines to focus on heating the barn, so Nathan engineers a wind turbine, but it will take brute force and incredible team work to erect the monstrosity and provide much-needed power.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The River Wild
programme.desc: The Kilchers call in a favour hoping to finish their largest project on schedule. They have 48hrs to rebuild a cabin and a long cattle fence.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Open Season: Change of Plans
programme.desc: As surgery for Otto approaches, he races to finish construction with the help of his family. Atz Lee reveals the new homestead to Jane and she struggles to keep her emotions in check.

programme.title: Raising Wild: A Windmill and a Prayer
programme.desc: Drastic seasonal changes force the Hines to focus on heating the barn, so Nathan engineers a wind turbine, but it will take brute force and incredible team work to erect the monstrosity and provide much-needed power.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Spring to Action
programme.desc: As the warm weather descends the Kilchers won't have any time to sit around and enjoy the sun if they want to survive the coming winter as Caribou hunting is underway.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: New Beginnings on Perl Island
programme.desc: As spring arrives, Atz Lee and Atz Sr. travel to Perl island to find feasible land for their cattle. The Constructor is surveyed and salvaged through a risky maneuver, and Jane constructs an innovative dog sled for Atz Lee.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Search for a Super Croc
programme.desc: Crocodiles have always been known as the invisible predator and very little has been know about their movements and habits. In this Australian adventure, Steve attempts to unmask these secret reptiles that have survived for over 60 million years.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Roly-Poly Puppies
programme.desc: A shy puppy comes out of her shell with the help of her siblings. A trio of St. Bernard puppies follow their noses to big adventures. Also, an Airedale Terrier names Merlin tries to disappear from her eight brothers and sisters.

programme.title: Dogs 101: Australian Shepherd, Xoloitzcuintli, Korthals Griffon, Pekingese, Chesapeake Bay Retriever
programme.desc: Meet the Pekingese, Korthals Griffon, Chesapeake Bay Retriever and Australian Shepherd.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Swiss Family Surprise
programme.desc: Pete heads to Michigan to help a husband surprise his wife with a Swiss Family Robinson inspired treehouse for their anniversary. Far more advanced than its castaway motivation, the treehouse is supported with steel beams to hold tons of modern amenities.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treehouse Point 2.0
programme.desc: Pete and his family gear up to expand their treehouse empire on 23 acres of forest wonderland. As construction kicks off, Pete enlists his son Charlie to oversee the project and builds an incredible treehouse home base for him to live in fulltime.

programme.title: Tanked!: Polar Opposites
programme.desc: Valley View Casino, Southern California, wants a 35-foot-long marquee tank in three weeks.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Mouse Deer Move-Out
programme.desc: It's time for mouse deer Una to leave her parents and meet a mate of her own. The zoo has a new space her & future partner Biani but she's proving rather shy, and hides in her new nesting box both day and night.

programme.title: The Zoo: Back to Africa
programme.desc: Zoo staff make the journey to east Africa to return to the wild thousands of toads they helped rescue from extinction. Utu, the test-pilot giraffe, tries out a new piece of equipment. And the bird department works to save the lives of millions of birds.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Saving Each Other
programme.desc: A veteran makes a heart-breaking plea for help to be reunited with his dogs. A shelter seeks Tia's help when they are overwhelmed by dogs that have been rescued from shocking conditions.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Clash of Wills
programme.desc: Tia and Perry rush to save a pit bull that has been tied up and left in a vacant lot. A returning adopter searching for a new family member is in for a surprise. Finally, a request from Earl's son becomes a lesson in hard work.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Home Alone
programme.desc: After discovering rogue bears near their home site, the Browns beef up their defenses. Billy falls seriously ill and is forced to seek medical help. The kids are left to fend for themselves and build a large raft to help move lumber.

programme.title: Movie: Good Deeds
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman's predictable life changes when he meets a single mother who lives a modest life.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: Helen McCarter has everything going for her, until her wealthy husband admits to having an affair and throws her out of the house. A distraught Helen turns to her family as she learns to stand up on her own two feet.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married?
programme.desc: Three couples take a week-long vacation to figure out why they got married.

programme.title: Martin: Baby, It's You
programme.desc: Martin agrees to host a baby shower for Gina's expecting friend at his apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Workin' Day and Night
programme.desc: Stan, Tommy and Cole convince Martin that Gina controls his life. To prove them wrong, he starts working double shifts at the radio station, which is exactly what Gina didn't want.

programme.title: Martin: Control
programme.desc: When Gina accidentally throws out Martin's basketball tickets, she tries to get replacement tickets from Sheneneh.

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend
programme.desc: A jealous Martin scares away Gina's new male friend, but he regrets his actions when Gina forces him to go shopping with her.

programme.title: Martin: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: An accident happens when Martin and Gina are caring for Mama Payne's beloved parrot.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will's Misery
programme.desc: Will gets caught up in a sorority prank that is meant to teach him to respect women.

programme.title: The Parkers: Take the Cookies and Run
programme.desc: Stuck with 6,000 cookies, Nikki taps the girls from her Big Sister program to sell them.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Altos
programme.desc: Nikki lands an internship and becomes convinced her boss is a mobster out to kill her.

programme.title: The Parkers: Family Ties and Lies
programme.desc: Nikki and her family compete on a new TV game show where contestants spill family secrets.

programme.title: The Parkers: Secret Santa
programme.desc: Nikki's Scrooge-like friends turn down her invitation to a tree-trimming party.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Father Knows Best
programme.desc: Ashley realizes that there is more to life than the controlled environment she lives in.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Sooooooooul Train
programme.desc: Philip and Vivian have been named one of the 25 most memorable couples of Soul Train.

programme.title: Martin: Fat Like Dat
programme.desc: When Gina convinces Martin that he's gaining weight, he and the guys take dieting and exercise to the extreme.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 1)
programme.desc: After Gina and Pam get promotions, Martin realizes his job is going nowhere.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Martin takes steps to ensure that he gets on Varnel Hill's talk show.

programme.title: Martin: Thanks for Nothing
programme.desc: Thanksgiving gets interesting when Martin's relatives and Gina's parents come to dinner.

programme.title: Martin: Whoop There It Ain't
programme.desc: Pam challenges Gina and Martin to see if they can abstain from having sex for two weeks.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Revolution
programme.desc: Nikki and Professor Oglevee decide to educate the gang about Rev. Martin Luther King Jr.

programme.title: The Parkers: My Two Dads
programme.desc: Nikki's biological father pays a visit, causing tension with the father who raised her.

programme.title: The Parkers: To Love or Not to Love
programme.desc: Nikki's growing obsession for Prof. Oglevee prompts her friends to stage an intervention.

programme.title: The Parkers: Don't Believe the Hype
programme.desc: T decides to leave the band, Freestyle Unity, on the eve of their scheduled performance.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet Mom Again
programme.desc: Will's mother, Vera, visits again and problems arise between Will and Sasha as a result. Meanwhile, Brown helps Brianna and Jamal with a school assignment that puts them in the role of mother and father.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Lovers
programme.desc: Sasha is kissed by Troy, an attractive doctor, and Will's mentor. He threatens Will's job to keep Sasha quiet. Meanwhile, Brown busts up a fake hall pass scheme when he gets hired as the security guard at the school.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Tension
programme.desc: Edna and the Colonel break up, and Brown tries to get them back together so she won't move back in. Meanwhile, thanks to Troy, Will gets reinstated at the hospital.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Liar
programme.desc: Tanya shows up asking for Cora's help. Meanwhile, Brown and Derek get quarantined in the hospital and have to help Renee deliver a baby.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Adoption
programme.desc: The adoption verdict leaves Tanya with the kids, but she gives them back to Will and Sasha. Meanwhile, Brown breaks Edna's record player.

programme.title: Movie: The Cookout
programme.desc: Number-one draft pick Todd Anderson celebrates signing a $30 million contract with the New Jersey Nets by throwing a barbecue at his mansion. This raucous party doesn't go over well with his snooty neighbours.

programme.title: Movie: Looper
programme.desc: In the year 2044, a man working for a group of killers is sent back in time for a job only to realize his victim is himself.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick and Evelyn return to save the world after their son accidentally resurrects an evil Chinese emperor.

programme.title: Movie: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: Alongside his stepfather, a young man goes in search of his missing grandfather on a mythical island.

programme.title: Movie: Hansel and Gretel: Witch Hunters
programme.desc: Bounty hunter siblings Hansel and Gretel travel around the world tracking and killing witches. The duo find a clue to their past when they encounter a new kind of evil.

programme.title: Futurama: Into the Wild Green Yonder

programme.title: Bigfoot: The Definitive Guide

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Stepping Stone
programme.desc: The Intelligence unit investigates a string of murders linked to a Colombian drug cartel. Meanwhile, a rookie is pulled from the police academy to join the team.

programme.desc: Homer is diagnosed with narcolepsy, but instead of returning home with his prescription medication, he returns home drunk. He and Marge visit a marriage counsellor and have a trial separation, during which Homer begins dating a 20-something.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Cue Detective
programme.desc: Scotty Boom, a Chew Network super-chef, challenges Homer to a smoke-off. But when someone steals Homer's secret weapon – a smoker he bought off a mysterious man at a BBQ shack – Lisa and Bart are on the case.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Puffless
programme.desc: Upon learning that their father really died of lung cancer, Selma and Patty agree to quit smoking. When Selma relapses, an angry Patty moves in with Marge and Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Halloween of Horror
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes scared at the Krustyland Halloween Horror Night, Homer is forced to take down his Everscream Terrors decorations. Halloween pop-up employees seek vengeance on Homer for causing them to lose their jobs.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVI
programme.desc: In the annual frightfest Halloween episode, Sideshow Bob finally kills Bart, only to reanimate him. Homer wakes up with short-term memory loss, and Lisa, Bart and Milhouse get super powers from radiation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friend With Benefit

programme.title: The Simpsons: Paths of Glory
programme.desc: Lisa sets out to restore the tarnished reputation of Springfield's first female inventor. To find her invention, she scours an abandoned asylum and a restaurant that caters to men.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Barthood
programme.desc: Bart's coming of age story, a la 'Boyhood,' chronicles his life from six years old to his time as an accomplished young man.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl Code
programme.desc: After a photo Marge posts on social media gets Homer fired, he returns to the best job he ever had, a dishwasher at a Greek restaurant. This same post inspires Lisa to code an app that predicts the real-life consequences of anything you post online.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Teenage Mutant Milk-Caused Hurdles

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is in the N2-O2-Ar-CO2-Ne-He-CH4

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gal of Constant Sorrow

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Oh, Pol-y Night
programme.desc: It is the holiday season in Michigan and Dr. Pol and his team make their patient list, check it twice, and treat those who are naughty, spotty, snotty, and nice.

programme.desc: It’s fall in Michigan, so animals are getting final checkups before the cold weather.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Albert Ein-swine
programme.desc: For Thanksgiving, Charles decides to cook dinner for the staff at the clinic.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Savage Seas
programme.desc: On land, Africa’s predators rule supreme but there’s no beating the battles fought under its seas.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Imhotep's Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mysteries of Alien Stars
programme.desc: Cutting-edge research into the universe's strangest stars offer new leads to unexplained stellar phenomena, and using the latest science and tech, experts reveal discoveries that could change everything we know about the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Spacetime
programme.desc: Spacetime, the secret structure that controls our universe, is a strange four-dimensional substance that controls time, light, and energy, and will also determine how our universe will end.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Nightmares of Neutron Stars
programme.desc: Neutron stars are strange and violent phenomena which defy the laws of physics, and new discoveries show that these bizarre nightmares are potentially far deadlier than we ever thought, with the power to destroy planets and even other stars.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Twin Suns: The Alien Mysteries
programme.desc: Planets that orbit two suns instead of one might be deadly hell worlds, but new discoveries reveal that sci-fi star systems with binary stars might be optimal places for alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Spacetime
programme.desc: Spacetime, the secret structure that controls our universe, is a strange four-dimensional substance that controls time, light, and energy, and will also determine how our universe will end.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Beating Columbus
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists investigate the first confirmed Viking settlement in America, and using cutting-edge technology, they're making new discoveries that will change everything we know about American history.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders
programme.desc: Experts investigate a mysterious set of clues that suggest the Vikings could have ventured deeper into North America, and using cutting-edge tech, they put Viking ships to the test to reveal how far they could have gone.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Vikings and Native Americans might have fought a thousand years ago, and using cutting-edge tech, experts put their weaponry and tactics to the test to find out who might have won.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Ghosts of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: A mysterious artifact might be evidence that Vikings reached the American Midwest, and to investigate this controversial theory, archaeologists build a Viking boat to test if their ships could manage a dangerous 1,000-mile journey over the Great Lakes.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Curse of Death Island
programme.desc: A team of expert archaeologists are hot on the trail of the legendary Viking utopia of the Americas, and clues from the ancient Sagas lead them to a mysterious, hostile island with a deadly past.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: The Alaska Enigma
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that the Vikings of North America didn't just disappear, but might have traveled further into American than anyone ever imagined, and using the latest tech, experts put this shocking theory to the test.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to investigate a mysterious part of the ocean that's home to unexplained sightings of a terrifying sea monster. What they discover at this blue hole could lead them to an even stranger creature.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Mystery of the Spy Sabotage
programme.desc: A dangerous stretch of water in the Mediterranean is the resting place of an infamous sunken ship, and using the latest tech, Celine and Fabien Cousteau investigate if it was deliberately attacked by spies on a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to hunt for a long-lost shipwreck in the Bermuda Triangle, and if their top-secret clues are right, they might uncover new evidence that explains the disappearances in this deadly and mysterious place.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Search for the Sunken UFO
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge technology to investigate the most credible UFO sighting in history, when a strange alien craft was spotted crashing into the ocean. What they discover might reveal hard evidence of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Bermuda Triangle: Hunt for the Cotopaxi
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: American Monster: Two Families
programme.desc: Unraveling the mystery behind the confusing evidence at the scene of April Holton's tragic murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Anything for You
programme.desc: The Snyders are thrilled when their 34-year-old son Mike finally starts a family with his sweetheart - as seen in these home videos. But after being diagnosed with a terrible illness, Mike vanishes. Only years later does his horrific fate comes to light.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Cris-Cross
programme.desc: In 2004, Detective Postiglione investigates the rare double homicide of two young college students in an apartment near a Nashville university. When a third victim is gunned down, a state-wide manhunt in launched to find the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Truck Stop
programme.desc: The deceased body of a young mother is found naked and gruesomely displayed inside a public truck stop near downtown Nashville. Sergeant Postiglione uncovers a trail of evidence across multiple states that lead him to a serial killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Air McNair
programme.desc: Retired NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death along with his young mistress. Pat Postigilone reveals the true story of his investigation and its shocking conclusion, which has become the most talked about murder mystery in Nashville history.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: The Sinner
programme.desc: When a young husband is shot dead in his Morris, Alabama home, police initially believe it's a robbery gone awry. But once the town rumor mill swirls to life, authorities uncover a dark secret hiding between the pews of the local Baptist church.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stalked
programme.desc: 26-year-old Florence Ballino is found dead in her apartment in an unusual condition. Her attacker deliberately left behind clues in an attempt to confuse investigators. Detective Postiglione identifies one clue that inextricably connects to the killer.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: The Sinner
programme.desc: When a young husband is shot dead in his Morris, Alabama home, police initially believe it's a robbery gone awry. But once the town rumor mill swirls to life, authorities uncover a dark secret hiding between the pews of the local Baptist church.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fallen Angels
programme.desc: In 2002 a 12-year-old girl from Oregon City, OR goes missing on her way to school and the whole town is clamoring to find her. The police investigation offers little in the way of leads, and then the unthinkable happens - a second girl disappears.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Cris-Cross
programme.desc: In 2004, Detective Postiglione investigates the rare double homicide of two young college students in an apartment near a Nashville university. When a third victim is gunned down, a state-wide manhunt in launched to find the killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Family Business
programme.desc: An armored truck driver and his family commit a series of heists, eluding authorities for over a decade. But when one of them starts flashing the cash, their plan for living the good life begins to crumble.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What the Camera Didn't See
programme.desc: It was a murder mystery that lingered for years. Nique Leili, a wife and mother, was found dead near her suburban home a week after going missing. Her family immediately suspected husband Matt, who filed for divorce within days of her disappearance.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 1: Missing
programme.desc: In October 1989, 10 year-old-Amy Mihaljevic is lured to a suburban Ohio shopping mall by an unknown man and is never seen again. A 30 year mystery and nationwide manhunt ensues, thousands of leads, hundreds of suspects, one killer still at large.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains at large. A cavalcade of suspects emerges, each more compelling than the last. Investigators explore each one. Then, 106 days after Amy was taken, a gruesome discovery some 50 miles away from her Bay Village home: a body.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 3: New Evidence
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains on the loose and the case goes nationwide. Margaret appears on Oprah, anniversaries come and go, and then, finally, a confession. A man stands up in church in a neighboring town and declares: 'I killed Amy Mihaljevic.'

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: High School Horror
programme.desc: When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the ensuing investigation ends up uncovering more than her murderer, revealing a secret world of twisted sex, drugs, sadomasochism and bondage.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Night Shift Nightmare
programme.desc: The naked body of 19-year-old Wanda Musk is found just miles from where she worked at local gas station. In the wake of the vicious killing, suspicions mount over several young men in the community including her ex-boyfriend and a troubled local teen.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Beautiful Northwestern Airlines flight attendant Nancy Ludwig is discovered dead in her hotel room, her body mutilated and head almost decapitated. It will take the discovery of links to another heinous killing to blow the case wide open.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Murders
programme.desc: Pennsylvania native Janet Lynn Mickey's greatest dream is to start her own family. So, when she marries college football-star Darrell Tyburski her future seems secure. But when the young couple has children, they are led down the darkest path.

programme.title: Diabolical: Queen of Deception
programme.desc: 2011 is off to a rocky start when a beloved Susanville police officer is found dead. What first looks like suicide morphs into a full blown murder investigation when his wife becomes a suspect and detectives uncover a story of love, lust and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: Prichard AL is normally a quiet town but when the body of Re'Mano Campbell, a loving father, is found slain in his house the community grows apprehensive. And it'll take the cunning wit of local investigators to unravel the mystery of his murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Best of Friends
programme.desc: After sneaking out of his parent's Garden Grove, CA house for a secret late-night party, 19-year-old Jose Najera returns home to find both parents dead on their bedroom floor. Is it a random killing or a robbery gone wrong? The truth is more diabolical.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Shaw Camp Re-Imagination
programme.desc: Following a two-year search, Greg and Denise uncovered their 'diamond in the rough' when they purchased a cabin that was untouched for years on the beautiful shore of Messalonskee Lake in Sidney.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ballard
programme.desc: An early 1900s cabin that's intimately tied to Maine's history and legacy puts Chase and the team to the test as they try to re-create its original look and feel.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Modern Zen Backyard
programme.desc: Emily and Bryan have a barren yard with an existing shed so, instead of fixing it, Matt and his crew make it a feature. They build floating decks around reflecting pools and install a new pergola to create shade, transforming the space into an oasis.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Restored: 1906 Arts and Crafts House
programme.desc: Brett is called upon to restore a historically significant 1906 arts and crafts home. He brings it back to its original glory by reintroducing the closed-in fireplaces, re-instating the floor plan and replacing the 1980s kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Spanish Colonial Ranch Revival
programme.desc: Brett takes on a Spanish Colonial Revival that has had all of the beautiful original woodwork covered over with layers of paint. It's painstaking work to bring it back and the team hits some serious snags.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Freak Show of Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is sampling the craziest and most delicious funnel cakes from across the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Noah dives into some of the cheesiest dishes featured on Carnival Eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Good Eats: Date Tripper
programme.desc: Alton tells everything you need to know to get dates into your culinary life, including three recipes for the 1960s classic 'Devils on Horseback' and a very 'scrummy' sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Shrimp Tacos, Mofongo and Stuffed Pita
programme.desc: Brad heads to Malibu, California, to find a shrimp-centric food truck whose tempura-battered Baja shrimp tacos take the crave-able crustacean to the next level. Next, he travels to Los Angeles to try out a one-of-a-kind, homestyle Puerto Rican mofongo.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Loaded Hot Dogs, Shrimp Po' Boys and PB and J
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Las Vegas, Nev., to visit El Shuko, a food truck serving up traditional Guatemalan street food to the hungry masses. Chef Yasser Zermino and his brother, Christian, bring a taste of Central America to an American favourite.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pizza, Burgers and Cookies
programme.desc: Brad Miller visits the Mile High City, Denver, where the family-run Simply Pizza Truck is cranking out crowd-pleasing Neapolitan-style pizzas in 90 seconds flat thanks to a massive wood-burning oven.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Biscuit Sandwiches, Smoked Wings and Sweet Hand Pies
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Atlanta, Georgia, where he finds the Deep South Biscuit Co. truck delivering fried chicken biscuit with bourbon-bacon jam and a brisket biscuit sandwich with cherry cola barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Barbecue Ribs, Cheese Melts and Cake Balls
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Nashville, Tenn., for hickory-smoked baby back ribs with hot, Memphis-style barbecue sauce from the Smoke Et Al food truck and owner Shane Autrey.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Stuffed Arepas, Mac 'n' Cheese and Doughnuts
programme.desc: Brad Miller gets a taste of Venezuelan street food at Arepas House food truck in Denver, Colo., where Chef Jorge Dominguez serves a traditional corncake sandwich filled with marinated flank steak, grilled pork sausage and creamy avocado sauce.
